even with the new q system to play 1 game took for ages to play. i ve been 6 hours with family but only can ride 4 games for the pricy ticket. so not worth it. the car parking sucks! now this theme park is so boring then the last time year early 2000 . it was my family fav holiday place to being yet my uncle used to work here as a security officer but now no more like the place. totally disappointed.

never i thought this park as near as universal studio. after i came.. now i believe this one is better. why? nothing beats the cool weather while playing and riding all the thrill in the park. the amount of the rides is suffice for kids and adults. you should come.. buy a ticket from klook etc it s much cheaper. i was hesitant to buy because of the rain the day before. so i did not buy the ticket. i bought the ticket through the ticket machine and got about 50 higher price. . beat the queue by downloading the apps. and register to queue.. do it early some ride are fully booked already. awesome..

good place for entertainment and spend time during holidays. the weather is sometimes unpredictable so prepare raincoat in advance. all rides are safe but beware of your own personal belongings when entering. food here is quite pricey and there s many theme for each ride with their own souvenir shops. crowded during weekends and public holidays. in overall a good exeperience for me and my family.

the park is a bit small but with all the queuing even spending the full 8 hours inside is not going to be enough. and this is including the virtual queue system which is also difficult to get timeslots for. most of the digital rides like apes ice age are pretty much the same setup just with different videos playing and even the kids felt bored and disinterested pretty quickly. quite a few attractions were closed too. it was good to introduce malaysian rates at rm60 which made it more suitable for the value we get out of the park but they should really try to accommodate permanent residents and foreign spouses with long term visas since these are always family trips. the food scene was terrible. it s fine to be overpriced but the taste was horrible. furthermore the guy on duty in the ice cream stall was not service oriented at all. on the positive side there are plenty of drinking fountains the amenities are good with lockers and plenty of restrooms as well as life saving chairs and benches all over. the shows are great for those who don t wish to go on rides. then there are those workers who are on the pa the whole ride just shouting please do not take off your seat belt over and over again.. for every ride... those quirks aside it s overall still a nice place to bring your kids for a fun day out. go have fun!

went there as our end year trip my kids all had fun so much till or legs were sore from walking and queuing it was fun though.we manage to almost all attraction but a few of them were closed for maintenance..foods we re almost everywhere so it wasn t a hassle to find something munch while you walk around..had a great time
an enjoyable park with exciting rides and tasty food. arriving early is absolutely the best way to avoid crowds and long queues. be sure to bring a raincoat for the unpredictable highland weather!

excellent vip service. thank you halil for the thorough explanation throughout the whole process. he was very responsible and helped us handle everything inside the theme park. when there are large crowds this vip package is definitely worth purchasing.

the vr que system is stupid oncw booked still need to que. why? also the que is so long. should limit the number of people into the theme park. paid in full only enjoy 2 games. the que time cannot be trusted.

this was our third visit to genting and it was the worst experience we ve ever had. because it was the year end season the park was extremely overcrowded. we spent over 4 hours in the park and managed to ride only one attraction. for invasion of the planet of the apes we waited for more than an hour only to be told there was a technical issue and that we had to leave without riding. shortly after our reservation for acorn adventure was also denied due to another so called technical issue. as foreign visitors we ended up losing the entire day. our kids were extremely upset and ended up crying. when we contacted the ticket counter we were told to contact klook instead even though this is clearly an operational issue of the park. when we mentioned leaving a google review the staff simply replied no problem. this level of crowd control service and responsibility is unacceptable.

it was visited during xmas period and there are too many visitor each of ride needs 60 mins queue. some of them are frequently not available due to broken train. on 27 dec 2025 almost all day raining but no rain guarantee activated as it was said if continuous rain for one hour guest information said rain day guarantee will be activated if it is raining from opening till closing and if all rides are closed while it was 45 mins raining 15 mins misty 50 mins rain 10 mins misty so plan your visit ahead check the weather and dont trust rain day guarantee. meanwhile majority attractions were not performed at that day due to weather. tips 1. purchase ticket online one day before to get discounted rate. 2. bring tumbler or water bottle. 3. bring your own raincoat inside cost 15 rm. 4. dont visit during weekend otherwise more queue. 5. check the weather forecast

all were perfect except for the tourist that couldn t obey the rules and regulations. cutting up queue ask other people to queue up while the rest of them playing other rides. not just that they could just easily open and close the door or gates that wasn t authorized just to let their whole team family member in and out which it felt unfair for the rest of the visitor that paid the same amount of them.

theme park tickets can be purchased online or on site. suitcases are not allowed but there are lockers available for storage. the weather is cool because the park is located in a highland area. because of the cold weather you won t sweat at all while walking around the theme park. there are many adrenaline pumping rides for both kids and adults. wait times are displayed but they re not always accurate you can ask the staff at the entrance of each ride for a better estimate. there s also an app to view the full map of the park. water stations are available so don t forget to bring an empty bottle you re allowed to bring outside food. many people eat inside the park and sit on the ground which doesn t look very pleasant. the rides are usually short but some of them are really fun.

the facilities have too many technical fault. the waiting time was never accurate. arcorn advanture waiting time 5mins. actual waiting time 40mins to reach our turn. ice age expedition thin ice. i visited the place 3 years ago.3 rounds of entering 3 rounds of technical fault and have to go out including i the where i reached the waiting room. this year i gave the 4th chance for visiting it when reaching the stairs area another technic fault. so bye bye i don t have chance to see what s inside the game about. after 3 years still encounter the same technical issue. mad ramp peak. this is epic. still coming soon after 3 years. now for the positive part environment is good. i felt it s compatible to universal studio level but the maintenance part seems a bit worrisome. seeing bolt and nut started to rust without paint.

love love love had an amazing vip experience with priya!! she was so sweet and fun to hang with. the rides were amazing and she knew exactly what to choose for us. loved this trip and a whole amusement park on top of the mountains!!

this beautiful theme park is made on hill top. resembles to disneyland... too much of waiting time for each ride makes the experience bad. also special vip lines makes the waiting time more difficult. instead spend your more time in the genting mall which has a great shopping experience and the casino too.

the theme park opens at 10am so it s best to come early. there s a fun broadway style show right at the entrance to welcome you in. the place is spacious with plenty of attractions and entertainment. you ll need to queue for most rides depending on the crowd. morning queues are still manageable but it gets busier by afternoon. we spent the whole day there and still couldn t finish all the games and rides definitely coming back again! there s a variety of food available but a bit pricey which is expected. it usually rains in the evening so bringing your own raincoat is a good idea though they do sell them there too . overall it was an awesome experience! two thumbs up!

this is one of the best places to visit in malaysia. they have an indoor theme park as well as outdoor theme park. outdoor theme park is called the sky world. it s one of the best adventure parks which i have visited. there is plenty of thrilling adventure activities. the only down side is that it is very crowded during the weekends i suggest you visiting it during the week days. there is a cable car ride which is called the gondola which starts at the premium outlets and it takes us directly to the genting highlands. after that we have to get down a few stairs to enter the outdoor theme park. if you purchase tickets at the counters it s pretty expensive therefore we can book it through online apps.

visited on a weekday and it wasn t too crowded. wait times for rides were reasonable with the longest being about 20 minutes. the weather was nice and cool. i also appreciated the reusable lockers which made it convenient to store and retrieve my belongings. overall a decent day out. do buy the ticket in advance online as it way cheaper than getting on the spot.

i recently visited genting skyworlds and honestly it was such an amazing experience! the place is full of excitement from the moment you walk in. the atmosphere feels like you re stepping into another world with vibrant themes and attractions everywhere. for those who love thrill and adrenaline this is definitely the spot. the extreme rides are a must try fast intense and so much fun that you ll want to go again and again. every game and ride has its own unique twist so it never feels repetitive. what i really liked is that it s not just for thrill seekers there are also plenty of family friendly attractions cool photo spots and good food options around the park. overall genting skyworlds is a place where you can spend the whole day without even realizing how fast time flies. if you re someone who enjoys extreme rides and adventurous fun this theme park should definitely be on your bucket list!

best decision ever to go for vip package. bypass long queues led by our host guide priya covered all amazing rides and repeated on several occasions all under 3hrs! back to kl for more shopping. amazing service and training genting skyworld keep up the standard of service!

i recently visited genting skyworlds theme park and honestly it was such a fun experience! the park is super clean well organized and the weather up in genting highlands makes the whole experience even better cool breeze no crazy heat like other theme parks. the rides are exciting and immersive especially the themed areas inspired by movies. the roller coasters give just the right adrenaline rush and there are also family friendly rides so it s suitable for everyone. the staff were friendly and helpful and queue times were reasonable if you plan properly. food options are decent a bit pricey but expected in a theme park . the design and atmosphere really make you feel like you re in a different world.
went here on a perfect weather day manage to try most of the rides. really enjoyable some are suitable for older visitors too. roller coasters arent that extreme but definitely worth a go!

good family fun. a unique experience of theme park up in the clouds. the weather can get cold and rainy. carry a light jacket and a rain coat. acorn adventure independence day defiance and samba gliders are fun. ideal visit duration is 2 3 hours.
awesome tourist spot near to kuala lumpur city. cool climate surrounded by misty breezes and amazing fun adventure activities.

we had so much fun we purchased the vip experience our tour guide shakir was very friendly and nice i really recomend getting the vip experience because it is really worth getting. the vip experience includes pictures complimentary snacks and we didnt have to wait in the linee . i really really recommend going it was very fun. will come again soon. 5
great vip experience with our tour guide ellya! managed to take 7 rides within 3 hrs because we got the upmost priority q free ice cream popcorn welcome drink and rain coat d

disappointing experience! i was expected it would be so much fun having all the attractions there. apparently there were so many attractions under constructions. when we wait in one of the attractions they canceled it last minute due to technical issue. try to go for another attraction but waiting time is taking forever. in the end we left early. only playing two attractions from 11 am to 4 pm. not worth the price won t going back for sure.

beautiful theme park with attractive decorations. came here on a monday but entered quite late my mistake as we arrived late. but we managed to go on a few rides and take some great pictures. be sure to book tickets a day early and download their app too. waiting times were kinda slow but it was pretty crowded even for a monday but worth the wait

genting skyworlds is an exciting theme park set high in the cool genting highlands. queues can be long on weekends and holidays so you may want to consider the possibility of going on a weekday. the food prices are sky high as well but then again it s expected to splurge when you re in genting.

we had a fantastic and memorable day at genting outdoor.the combination of thrilling rides beautiful mountain scenery and cool climate creates a unique and enjoyable experience that is hard to find elsewhere in malaysia. it s a wonderful destination for families and adventure seekers.

loved the outdoor themepark. the queue was long on a monday. we could not complete all the rides despite started around 11am entering the theme park but rest assured the outdoor games were so fun to ride.

genting skyworlds was an amazing experience unlike anything i ve done before. the rides were thrilling the park was well designed and the atmosphere was full of energy. it was my first time at a theme park like this and it truly exceeded my expectations. from exciting attractions to great photo spots everything was wonderful. a perfect day out for families friends or anyone looking for fun and adventure in malaysia!

fantastic experience with vip access having mr. adib as our tour guide for my kids and family. fast and easy access to all ride. he s patience friendly and polite very helpful with my 5 kids. they love him alot!

honestly despite the long queues for some rides the system is efficient and the queue moves steadily. some of the games are genuinely thrilling and worth trying out. remember to download virtual queue apps so you can get some rides without even queuing

it s my 2nd time with the vip experience.. my first was with nina last year she was a great ambassador. we get to take quite a lot of rides and i managed to ride samba gliders for 3x which is my fav ride! after the vip guide ended she gave me our tix and guided me to use the virtual queue for me to take the ride again! which me my family really enjoy it on top of it there is complimentary ice cream popcorn 3 printed photos digital photos as well.. we took photo with her as well to end the day.. we had a blast! we went during december 2nd week today our experience was with halil we had a great time too! but the experience is a bit differrent we went for 7 attractions but we did not get to repeat the ride due to time as well and it s ph so kind of different. we did take a few photo as well the complimentary are the same. but at the end of the day we did not get to take the ride again as we don t have the tix to scan for the virtual queue unless i have to go to the normal queue i guess? so we just leave the theme park.. the vip experience guide is 3 hours the experience is good but i wish we could get to play more. who knows we will come back again for the 3rd time with vip experience thank you for the awesome experience and happy holidays!

i enjoyed my visit to genting skyworlds the systems in place were great and i really loved how convenient their app was especially for checking ride wait times. the park has a lot of potential but i just wish they could maintain a more lively and energetic vibe. it felt a bit quiet and lacking the fun atmosphere you d usually expect from a theme park. during my visit many of the rides were closed which was disappointing. food prices were decent but overall the park felt a bit expensive for what it currently offers especially when compared to places like legoland. i hope they add more activities and bring more energy into the park in the future because it definitely has promise

this is the most wonderful park of all even though it has only a few games. the scenery is beautiful and the artworks are also very attractive to visitors. i just want to stay here all day and don t feel like going anywhere else. it s truly amazing and i promise that i ll come back here again very soon.

overall my visit to genting skyworlds theme park was a good and enjoyable experience. the rides are immersive and genuinely fun with a nice mix of thrill rides and attractions suitable for different age groups. downside is the more exciting rides are too short. a lot of thought has clearly gone into the ride themes and overall park design. food options were another highlight there s a good variety available and the quality is better than what you d normally expect from a theme park. it s easy to find something decent to eat without feeling overly restricted to typical fast food choices. however the carnival booth games were quite disappointing. they feel heavily rigged and not very rewarding which takes away from the fun and makes them hard to recommend. as the day goes on queue times do become very long especially for popular rides. that said the ability to book ride slots through the mobile app helps make the waiting more manageable and allows you to plan your time better instead of standing in line the whole day. with some improvements to queue management and fairer carnival games the experience could be even better. still it s a solid theme park worth visiting especially if you plan ahead and make good use of the app. p.s. dont stay at first world hotel. the check in experience is terrible and the check in queue can take up to 3 hours

had a great day here and it was nice to get away from the hot temperatures in the city. the rides were really good and barely any wait time we went on a thursday at opening time until 3pm there wasn t many people around at all. it was nice to get food and sit down anywhere to eat it. food and drinks were reasonable price in the park. it started to drizzle lightly but it passed quickly. we noticed a couple of rides stopped operating when the weather came through and they didn t re open when we were there so make sure you get the rides you really want to do done first. it s a shame you had to pay 7aud to rent a locker at the ice age rollercoaster and again at the rio rollercoaster. yet all the other rides had the bins where you leave your belongings when you get on. lots of ticket booths before you go in to get your tickets make sure you allow time to explore the shopping mall and indoor theme park located before entry.

genting highlands also known as resorts world genting is one of the most popular mountain getaways near kuala lumpur sitting at an altitude of about 1 700 meters. getting there by road is an experience in itself the winding curvy mountain roads are quite similar to those in nepal with plenty of turns as you climb higher. you can reach by car or bus but one of the best ways is to take the cable car which offers stunning views of the rain roads and valleys below. the cable car is cheap convenient and even available in combo tickets with buses from nu sentral kl which is very handy if you plan ahead. the highlight here is the skycasino which has free entry. inside you can enjoy a variety of games by purchasing a ticket card it s modern and lively with plenty of entertainment options. the indoor theme park has a kids zone games small rides and even zip lines but overall the theme park feels a bit outdated and would benefit from more activities and upgrades to attract families and younger visitors. there are also shopping malls with some clothing brands and a food court that is sufficient but not very large. overall genting highlands is a fun short trip from kl for its cool weather entertainment and scenic cable car ride but the attractions could use more updates and variety to make the experience even better.

unfortunately did not have that good of a time here. we came at 11am until 6pm and only had time to go on 6 rides which i think was really not worth it. the app does help with ride reservations but it kept having issues. you can only book up to 3 rides at a time. but even if you didn t when you try to reserve it it keeps saying the slot for the chosen time isn t available even after i refreshed closed to app and tried other times. the waiting time also isn t accurate. on the app it would say 30 minutes but in reality we waited up to 50 minutes which is an insane amount of time to wait. the rides that we reserved also kept having technical issues so we ended up not having time to go on any of them. however i must admit i did have some fun here. the park is lovely i loved the attention to detail of the sets and they are definitely picture worthy.

one of the best entertainment places you will ever get in the weather there is so nice which make enjoy more the games variety of games you can play and different areas that makes you feel you are transporting through time the services was great and a many restaurants or food places you can enjoy your meal the price is reasonable 189 ringgit for foreigners you can use all the games accept the food or lockers you can not play carrying a bag so you have to use the lockers advice try not to cary one

absolutely not. the entire virtual queue is bs you can only book three rides max so if you want to come here make sure you download their stupid app and thoroughly understand the procedure that they don t bother to explain or else you ll have to find their underpaid and overwork staff looking overwhelmed helping all the tourist that is clueless. also not all rides will be available. i came where it s available but again fully booked so may who read this have the luck to book your ride. overall just total bs. there s other stuff that are better here in genting.
absolutely amazing.. you need to go here if you come to malaysia even tho i go on rainy season i m still having so much fun with my friends

our visit coincide with the peak season as it s near xmas holiday. 21 25 dec 2025 managed to buy the annual pass for rm 211 at promo price but the app system kept having glitches and not able to show all our tickets in the app. we spent 2 hours at the guest service to do the registration and bookings. queue was long and kids got very angry after queuing under the scorching hot sun. we had trouble adding tickets into the app for all family members so couldn t get a group virtual queue we gave up after first ride which 13 of us spent 1hour queuing. we decided to go back on the second day but still not able to add our tickets into the themepark app hence no vq ticket for some of us. after some complains to the rides crew the guest service team assigned mr. jai from vip experience to assist us for 3 rounds of rides. kids finally able to enjoy the themepark on our second day. thank you so much mr. jai! we finally able to enjoy the themepark on second day. kids love it but the long queue for rides and the super bright sun definitely is a challenge for our big group with 7 young kids. will definitely purchase the vip experience next visit and request for mr jai!
totally worth every penny although queuing time is very long dued to holiday but the attractions are fantastic!

i had such an amazing time at genting skyworlds theme park the cool mountain air and vibrant atmosphere made the whole experience feel extra magical. the rides were genuinely thrilling especially the immersive themed zones that made me feel like i d stepped into another world. i left with sore feet a huge smile and memories i m already excited to relive.
genting highlands offers cool weather scenic views theme parks casinos and shopping. a lively hilltop escape for fun family trips and entertainment though weekends can be crowded.
best theme park on such amazing altitude. rides are full of thrill and adventurous. rides are for all age groups.

skyworlds theme park at genting highlands is a wonderful theme park for families. it is wide spread and has a lot of attractions and various park areas. the activities are suitable for all ages ranging for small kids rides to roller coasters. many eateries are available at the spot even residential hotels and shopping areas are all in one location. you get a collective ticket for nearly all attractions and you don t have to pay for each attraction. the park is located at a hilly area and weather is quite cold here. on the day of my visit it was raining lightly but there was mist all around. we enjoyed the whole day full of family fun.

i had very high expectations for genting skyworlds theme park but the overall experience was extremely disappointing and frustrating. the crowd management was terrible. almost every ride had a waiting time of at least one hour with several popular rides stretching to two or even three hours. what made this worse was that the wait times shown at ride entrances and on the official app were highly inaccurate. for example esd global defender was displayed as a 20 minute wait but i ended up queuing for more than an hour which is more than triple the stated time. similarly while the estimated time for the rivet town roller was an hour the actual queue took almost 2 and a half hours. this makes planning your day nearly impossible. the park also lacks a single rider lane which is a huge missed opportunity to improve efficiency. many ride vehicles were clearly not filled to capacity yet staff did not actively look for individual riders to fill empty seats. this poor operational decision unnecessarily extended waiting times for everyone. to make matters worse multiple rides experienced temporary closures and technical issues throughout the day. notable examples include invasion of the planet of the apes ice age expedition thin ice and sid s rock n slide. given the long waits ride breakdowns were especially frustrating and wasted a significant portion of the day. the virtual queue system is also poorly designed and not worth using. attractions like boot camp and esd global defender require you to use up one virtual queue slot yet you are still required to physically queue for a long time afterward. expending a limited virtual queue only to wait again defeats its entire purpose. finally food and beverage options are very limited and the seating areas within f b outlets are far from sufficient for the crowd size. finding a place to sit and eat was unnecessarily stressful adding to an already exhausting experience. overall genting skyworlds suffers from poor crowd control inaccurate information inefficient ride operations and weak planning. for the price paid and the hype surrounding the park this experience was far below expectations.

genting skyworld theme park offers a fantastic experience and is the perfect destination to enjoy quality time with friends and family. although the food options inside the park are a bit pricey they are the only ones available. the unlimited access to amusement rides is a major highlight letting you enjoy them as many times as you like. however do expect longer queues especially during public holidays.

genting highlands was incredible! we took the cable car up and visited the casino the indoor skytropolis theme park and outdoor theme park! there were so many activities and rides to enjoy there s a shopping centre and lots of restaurants to choose from. it is such a big place with the largest hotel in the world! genting highlands is a must see!

don t like it this sky ave hotel..looks like budget class hotel room small. we re didn t go to skywalker and skyworlds thems...because the hotel room point ours moody...morning 9am we re immediately check out hotel room left genting highland...never visit casino...never come anymore there. first time and the last time there.....restaurant staffs service very bad and foods ...not nice

skyworlds theme park offers a solid international level experience! the current promo book early valid till aug 2025 makes it great value. pro tips use their app to book rides it s like disney s fastpass but free! while the merchandise and parade could be more exciting the flexibility to re enter after meals is a plus. just note the early 6pm closing so plan wisely to hit all the rides. overall a fun packed day with smooth operations!

overall the vip experience added a lot of value to our visit and we are grateful for the excellent service provided. thank you to the genting skyworlds team for creating such a memorable and well organised experience. we look forward to coming back again. thank you. vip guide escort ms. erin.

genting skyworld was so fun!! we took vip pass and this is our review to our lo ellya she did reliable proactive and full of positive energy truly one of the key reasons this genting trip was a success. great work ellya!
this is one the best theam park ever i have visited. you just feel like you are out of this world . very pictures place every age group people will love this place .

genting skyworlds theme park is truly one of the most exciting attractions in malaysia especially for those who love thrill rides movie themed experiences and beautiful mountain views. located in the cool climate of genting highlands the park offers a refreshing escape from the city heat. the rides are modern well designed and inspired by famous movies and adventure themes. from adrenaline pumping roller coasters to family friendly attractions there is something for everyone. one of the highlights is how immersive the park feels the detailed environments sound effects and storytelling make each zone enjoyable and memorable. the staff are generally friendly and helpful and the park is clean and well maintained. the weather adds to the experience making it comfortable to walk around though sudden rain or fog can sometimes cause temporary ride closures. while this can be disappointing it is understandable due to safety reasons. food options are available throughout the park but prices are slightly on the higher side. planning your visit early in the day is recommended as queues can get long during weekends and public holidays. using the virtual queue system helps save time and makes the experience smoother. overall genting skyworlds theme park offers a fun immersive and high quality theme park experience. despite minor drawbacks like weather dependency and pricing it is definitely worth visiting for families couples and thrill seekers. it s a place that creates lasting memories and leaves you wanting to come back again.
i went there for the first time last sunday with the vip experience package and having hernie apologizing if the name spelling is wrong as our guide. it was such a fun experience and a great memory.

i m glad to join the vip experience program from 11.00 14.00 was a full vip service from firdaus ashley our vip experience guide. we enjoy all the main ride and the entertainment. i definitely recommend the vip experience package

had a great time at genting skyworlds! the themed zones are visually amazing especially the ice age and andromeda areas. rides like independence day and rio were super fun and the cooler highland weather made walking around enjoyable. staff were friendly and helpful throughout the park. however a few rides were closed and queue times can be long if you don t use the vq app which had some glitches . also the opening hours felt a bit short for the ticket price. overall a solid day out with friends or family if you plan well and avoid weekends. definitely worth visiting once!

i honestly wouldn t recommend this theme park. 1. if you re bringing kids don t bother. children below 100cm can only ride one attraction which makes the ticket price completely not worth it. 2. the weather makes it even worse. it s scorching hot with hardly any shaded areas to cool down. 3. the virtual queue system is useless. it doesn t work so you re forced to line up for hours. i had to queue for almost 3 hours just to get on one ride. 4. and after all that waiting the ride itself only lasted about 1.5 minutes. 5. overall it felt like such a waste of time money and energy. definitely not worth it

this theme park delivers big thrills and fantasy themed lands with rollercoasters and family rides that really light up the whole hillside resort. the mix of outdoor excitement and immersive worlds makes it superb for kids and thrill seekers alike. it s definitely one of the main draws many visitors book travel days around. that said on a busy holiday weekend the queues can get long and the weather a touch unpredictable it s up on a mountain after all . still the adrenaline fun photo ops and vibrant atmosphere make it worth the effort if your group loves theme park energy and varied rides.

genting highlands theme park is truly an unforgettable experience! the entire place is vibrant well organized and full of energy. the variety of rides is amazing there s something for thrill seekers families and even those who prefer relaxed attractions. the blend of indoor and outdoor experiences is fantastic and the cool mountain weather makes the whole day much more enjoyable. queues were managed well safety standards were visibly high and staff were friendly and helpful throughout. the surroundings views and overall atmosphere make it a perfect getaway spot. whether you re visiting with friends family or even solo you ll definitely have a great time. highly recommended for anyone visiting malaysia!

if you pay at the counter it will be 198 myr for a non malaysian. but if you proceed with online reservations in advance the price will be 130 myr. this entry ticket covering all the events and games is overpriced in my point of view. also the time an average person can allocate to spend here is limited. time should be highly considered before your entry because the shopping dining and other activities also needs time.

had an amazing time at genting skyworlds! one of the coolest amusement parks i ve been to fun rides smooth experience and the weather is just perfect since it s right at the top of the hill. what i really liked is that you can go in and out of the park as many times as you want they register your fingerprint at the entrance so re entry is super easy. it s also directly connected to the mall which makes the whole experience even better you can chill grab food shop and then head back to the rides without any hassle. overall it s a great mix of thrill convenience and relaxation. definitely worth a visit if you re in malaysia!
vip experience a superb less time on queue personalised trip and someone lead us the way. wonderful experience from miss erin who in charge of our group.

genting skyworlds theme park a thrill beyond imagination! i visited genting skyworlds last year and it was truly one of the most exciting theme park experiences of my life! located high in the cool hills of genting highlands malaysia this world class park offers the perfect mix of thrill fun and cinematic magic. every zone in the park is uniquely themed from action packed rides inspired by hollywood movies to immersive family friendly attractions. whether you re a roller coaster lover or just want to enjoy the vibe skyworlds has something for everyone. what i loved the most independence day defiance a heart pounding indoor ride! epic voyage to moon base unforgettable visual effects. beautifully designed zones like eagle mountain andromeda base and central park. clean surroundings helpful staff and excellent crowd management. the weather at genting is cool all year round which makes the day even more enjoyable. i suggest arriving early to cover all the rides and shows without rush. don t forget to take loads of pictures the park is extremely instagram worthy! location genting highlands malaysia tip book your tickets in advance online and download the skyworlds app for real time ride updates. rating 9.5 10 a must visit for adventure seekers and families alike!

went for a day trip worth the price for malaysian as it s with a promo price of rm64 if you purchase the ticket in advance from their website. rides are interesting suggest to hit the independent day and planet of the ape ride first then go for samba glider after when you reach early in the morning download of the app is a must it will show the queue status for the rides so you know where you can hit your next ride. none of the staff smiles when encountered some even just wave and ask me to go when i have a question i went on a weekday so it s not too crowded i guess so the attitude was kind of disappointing

my gf and i queue for 1h for the samba glider and also purchased locker for it too. ended up the slide is not functioning the stuff asked us to leave without an apology or explanation? the worst part is most of the slides are 1 to 2 hour. i recommend not going there and want a refund.

the staff managing the rides looked absolutely like they hate to be there. ive been to other theme parks and there s at least a smile...but nope...you wont get that here. now my gripe...we went there as a family of 4 with children and were excited to have the park to ourselves on a weekday. unfortunately the attendant did not inform us that the ride had a minimum number of 7 passengers and proceeded to measure the height of our kids. after being at the entrance and waiting we went back to the front to be told of such a requirement. we left to find random strangers to ask if they could oblige and even after they came with us...the same attendant said there would be a 10 min wait... ?! what ?? the theme park was empty !

we got vip tickets and didn t have to wait . teesha was fantastic. she often hold our things. if there is long lines busy season it s totally worth it to get vip tickets. i felt a bit bad cutting all the lines. we got free included pictures ice cream popcorn.

very scenic place. every corner u walk on is good to be a place for ootd haha. the food here was quite pricey but it is understandable considering its tourist spot.perfect for family getaway. the staffs are well trained and the queue was quite fast though there were many people. i recommend coming early so you can have more time to try all rides. all in all everyone should try come here to feel the thrill by themselves.

the amusement park experience was disappointing due to several factors. photos taken on the thrilling rides came with a steep price tag and even the priority queues had long wait times. to top it off the park s operating hours were inconveniently short opening late and closing too early.

felt like a scam waiting for the cable car more than 2 hours but the outdoor park closes at 6pm. reserved before a day and still could nt go to the park. no refundable or exchange tickets for any of this unwanted experience dont go really scam

very nice place for visit with family.drive from kl will be easy 2 hrs and the drive is absolutely awesome with great views on forest both the sides. so many rides for the kids but aware of the age for the kids.tickets can be bought from there and it s recommended to buy from there after checking the height otherwise it is a waste of money. no long queue for the rides and staff are very kind and nice. overall great place for family day out.
greetings from new zealand! such an amazingly vibrant place at 1800 m height. extraordinary and breathtaking views during some of the rides. a must visit place for young families if you are in kl.
my experience with skyworlds is not satisfying the staff are rude and talking in a way like we entered for free. also 3 games was under maintenance and closed.

you can access the ropeway that spans the entire genting highlands from the temple either by climbing a long flight of stairs or taking up to 11 connecting elevators. the journey itself was quite fun and added to the overall experience.

wonderful gate away place well maintained and decorated staff very helpful and friendly recommended to purchase the genting package. really helps in good quality pictures and preserving memories. for families with small kids. stroller rental is widely available. do not hesitate. such a great place to enjoy!
if you are genting member you could enjoy 50 until year end 2025 anniversary promotion but must purchase the ticket online n must be one day earlier
full of fantastic and enjoyable outdoor activities... adventurous magnificient fast and furious!
its a great theme park but over crowded. the app for virtual queue only allows 3 rides per day.

i just want to give a massive shoutout to one of the young staff members at skyworld boot camp he truly stands out in the best possible way! from the moment we arrived he was incredibly welcoming cheerful and full of positive energy. among all the staff he was the only one who consistently had a genuine smile for everyone creating such a warm and friendly atmosphere. my 5 year old daughter enjoyed the boot camp so much that she insisted on doing it twice! the first time we came this amazing young man was the one who assisted us with the harness and everything went smoothly. the second time he wasn t in that area and unfortunately the experience wasn t quite the same. the harness didn t feel right for my daughter and she was clearly uncomfortable. another staff member scolded her instead of helping properly which made things a bit stressful. what truly impressed me was that while we were already up on the obstacle course this same cheerful young man who wasn t even assigned to that section noticed from afar that my daughter s harness wasn t fitted correctly. without hesitation he alerted a co worker to fix it immediately. i was so relieved because safety is absolutely crucial in these kinds of activities especially for young kids. thanks to his attention to detail care and initiative my daughter was safe and able to enjoy the rest of the course. kudos to him for going above and beyond he truly cares about the guests and their safety. skyworld is lucky to have someone like him on the team!

not recommended during promotion price. so many people until it took almost an hour for a game. i wish the game could be longer so it is worth our super long waiting time. please buy the ticket from its official website so you won t have to queue registering your ticket for the virtual queue.

came on 2nd june and queues can take up to 3hrs. virtual queue for every rides always full. some virtual queue vs normal queue also goes at similar speed lol. vr queue can be quite long too. might as well go normal queue. park closes too early. not worth for the price. bad queue management and i kept encountering indians cutting queue! you have to be observant as they will lie that they have a family member infront but they actually dont. lol. just dont let them go infront of you as they may be lying.

although it s the school holidays it did not seem to have too many people around until you hit the queues for rides. in 3 hours our group managed only 2 rides. they have a virtual queue system which is great but you have to setup the app in advance and know what rides you want. advise to install the app earlier to get familiarize with setting up groups. a bit of fiddling around to setup groups especially a big group like ours. and book early. we waited over an hour for the popular independence day defiance ride. that ride was worth the wait though. but would be great if you managed to use the virtual queue we tried but it was not available when we tried at 11am. so book that as early as you can. overall skyworlds was not bad especially from a price point of view compared to the disneyland and universal studios.
enjoy every moment at skyworld genting. good facilities such as surau food variety clean toilet with pipe and many more. games so good with modern atmosphere and cool.

this is a nice theme park for a day trip with family and friends. they offer a wide variety of real rides and family rides. my personal favorite is acorn adventure the roller coaster in the ice age themed area. in addition to the theme part the resort also has a wide variety of shopping and dining and it s all pretty affordable.

bought the tickets for rm65 during their 60th year anniversary promo. was really excited as i used to play at the old outdoor theme park when was small. but to my disappointment the rides are nothing close to the old park. according to google they have 26 rides but on the day we went friday at least 5 6 were closed. the epic park had both rides closed for maintenance. imagine paying for full price and you get this experience. the rides are either too extreme or too childish and i dont knw how many 3d 4d rides they have. those where you sit on a boat or whatever and the thing just move around while watching some screen animation. and not to mention rides were too short. the glide ride was fun but ended in less than 2mins. it does not have the same vibe anymore lets see when they gonna have trouble with the park

went to outdoor theme park two rides were out of service. andromeda jet and tower drop. hurm such bummer. anyway i suggest u use the vq for rollercoaster ride samba glider and tower. it really saves time. food stalls are available mostly at the entrance or u can just go inside indoor theme park to eat. the only setback is u have to go thru the entry process again. feels like those thumb prints are all gimmick. oh there s lockers available. the size is quite big can fit like 5 bagpacks. rm25 for 8 hours. bring water bottle u going to be thirsty. there s water refill station at locker area. and bring poncho it rains unpredictably. u dont have to bring cash. card n qrcode friendly
every game has their own thrill. good for family or solo. staff treat customer very good .. have to come early if want play many game.

my first time coming here got the price for malaysia rm60 . only 13 parks opened and the other was closed for maintenance. my family and i able to finish all the attractions parks within 10am 6pm. que was smooth all staff really ensure that things were safe before it all started. in terms of foodwise i can say that 5 5! food tastes great portion was big price almost the same like in kl. wow! usually theme park food are expensive and bad but here they really keep their quality. will definitely come back to genting again soon!
visiting on weekdays the rides are good but got 1 hr rain on the day i visited so getting paused there. nice staffs sadly the only themed ride is the ice age. place can be super crowded at times.

wonderful short getaway. for outdoor theme park avoid weekends and public holiday as the que for each ride will be very long. go during less crowd and you can enjoy all the rides there. download the skyworld app and book your ride prior to have vq access which is faster.

first time visiting the theme park after its rebranding to skyworlds. came on a weekend and the crowd was still acceptable. there is no express pass or such so make sure to download the skyworlds app and upload your ticket onto it to get the virtual queue so that you save time queuing up 3 virtual queues at a time . facilities wise it was just enough for a day saw a few more still renovating which i assume would be opening soon. certain rides do not allow you to even bring your bags into the queue hence make sure to also rent the locker to store your items rm25 for a full day . wished to have a few more rides which are thrilling though. there are a lot of snacks booths at different worlds . the food tastes okay price is the typical theme park price average rm30 per meal . currently there is a sale if you purchase your tickets online for rm65 only ends in august which is very worth. will plan a visit again next year perhaps when they have more facilities.

genting skyworlds theme park is a great place for a fun day out! the park is well designed clean and offers a variety of rides suitable for families and casual visitors. while the thrill level isn t the highest the themed zones 4d attractions and immersive experiences make up for it. the staff were friendly and efficient keeping the operations smooth despite some long queues. there are also plenty of dining options with a good variety of food. a tip for visitors buy your tickets at least one day in advance to get an rm30 discount per ticket! overall it s a well maintained and enjoyable theme park perfect for those looking for a relaxing yet entertaining experience. would definitely visit again!

definitely a great experience. buying vip is a hefty sum but definitely worth it. passing the long lines is just one of the many perks. the guide knows what they are talking about and know the best rides. my guides name was priya and she made the whole experience very enjoyable. ensuring our time was well spent at every ride.

i am writing to express my disappointment regarding my recent visit to slyparkworld theme park on saturday. i attended with my family of four and we had booked the gondola ride online. while the weather was cool and slightly rainy which is understandable there were several issues that marred our experience. firstly i would like to commend the cleanliness of the washrooms and the fair availability of food options within the park. however the most concerning issue was the excessively long waiting periods for each attraction. we spent nearly 1 to 1.45 hours waiting in line for each game which resulted in us only being able to participate in seven games during our visit from 10 30 am to 5 45 pm. this was quite disappointing as we missed out on many other attractions due to time constraints. i am particularly concerned about the upcoming school holidays as i believe that the situation will worsen with the expected increase in visitors. additionally the staff at some of the indoor studio games seemed to take a considerable amount of time to assist and guide us which further prolonged our wait. we also faced difficulties with the skywold app as we were unable to pre book or reserve vr slots due to unavailability. given these circumstances i regret to inform you that i will not be recommending slyparkworld to my family and friends in the future. i urge the management to review and improve the queuing system as soon as possible to enhance the overall visitor experience. thank you

i have come to genting skyworld theme park 6 times previously but those time i bought the standard ticket. it involves a lot of waiting and often no choice in getting good seats or viewpoint. this time we took the vip private deal and it s totally worth it. our tour guide took us to all the rides seamlessly and strategically taking into account rides which were under maintenance from time to time. the entire experience was efficient and we always had the best sweet spot because nurin always ensured that we do. we saved time from queuing and we were prioritised all the time it s vvip truly. we got free merchandise food and drinks. i would not go back to standard tickets. the only point i would say is that i would appreciate a buggy so that we don t need to walk. special thanks to nurin for the care she is friendly and helpful.

special tickets promo for pahang ian worth a visit even for kids. but with the crowd i need to have a long queuing time. dont forget to catch out hourly show at the theme park. for non pahang ian please make sure to book an online ticket a day before for the promo ticket price. promotion is extended until the end of 2025.
ms nurin was our ambassador. she was so fun friendly and patient throughout our vip tour. she made all our money worth the experience. thank you

we spent the entire day at the theme park on a pleasantly no so crowded monday being a couple with 14 year old daughter. to our surprise we all had an amazing time! at first we weren t sure if we were already past the right age for theme parks after all we ve visited disneyland legoland and universal studios before and thought it might be hard to feel that sense of wow again. it turned out we had nothing to worry about. the very first highlight esg independence day was dynamic cool and incredibly impressive. and i especially loved the ice age air base and rio themed experiences. the rides were a great mix some thrilling some whimsical and others simply fun. there s truly something to delight everyone no matter their preference. the best thing is that it wasn t so crowded and we tried almost all rides without waiting too long. strongly recommend families with children. everyone would love it.

my experience with fazira as our vip usher at genting theme park was truly exceptional. she was professional friendly and incredibly attentive from start to finish. every route and every ride was smoothly coordinated making our visit effortless and enjoyable. fazira handled everything with efficiency and confidence. her guidance saved us time avoided long queues and made the entire experience feel exclusive and well organized. you can really feel her dedication to ensuring guests are comfortable and well taken care of. if you re looking for top tier vip service fazira is highly recommended. her hospitality made the whole experience absolutely worth it. thank you fazira for the outstanding service! sorry lambat bagi feedback

my 1st experience going to genting highland and a bit disappointed because it not as extreme as what i expected. and more frustrated terraform is not open. so that will be my 1st and last time i go to gh eventho terraform will open in the future. but feel free to try the game if you easily scare.

my worst theme park experience. visited on a saturday came early at 10.30am sadly this was a total waste of money. queue times for rides are ridiculous easily 2 3 hours per ride. you ll already be exhausted after waiting 3 hours for a 5 minute ride which really spoils the trip. most of the waiting areas are enclosed with poor or no ventilation making it very stuffy and uncomfortable. with how overcrowded it is on weekends expect to only get on 2 3 rides the entire day not worth the price at all. tickets cost rm198 for non malaysian walk ins. if you really want to go buy your tickets on klook where it s almost half the price just make sure to book at least a day in advance as tickets aren t issued instantly. they also offer a virtual queue option i d advise booking those early as the slots get filled quickly.
still worth it la pi sini with price 65 for their annual 60 years.. even got some ride closed for maintenance i think.. but ya people a lot over there on weekends.. i do enjoy every moment though

excellent theme park basically a very decent 20th century fox world with pricing appropriate for the location. come on a weekday when it s not malaysian school holidays and the queues are short. rides are excellent and the park has continued to be well maintained i also visited approximately a year ago . the fire in 2024 didn t really affect much the same rides were closed in 2024 as in 2023
an absolutely beautiful place with lovely weather. the views from the top are breathtaking it feels like you re standing among the clouds. a perfect getaway to beat the kl heat!

a three will do just fine for what it takes and what it has to offer. the main attraction of the whole place is the casino. it takes some patience and skill to discover and be surprised all over again by the human mindset and philosophy.

went on one of the weekdays that is not monday so theres not much people. barely any queue for the rides utilise your vq friends . the longest queue was probably at 6pm when everyone was going back via cable car. boarded the cable car at 7 30pm. the sunset? chef s kiss.
theme park is child friendly more cost effective if purchase day pass. most rides are suitable for children above 6 years old. go on weekdays less crowded.

genting skyworlds is a must visit! the independence day defiance ride is dramatic immersive and super well maintained definitely a highlight. i also loved the rio samba gliders for the views and fun vibe and the ice age ride is a charming cool adventure. great atmosphere and smooth operations. highly recommend!

it was a terrible experience. some rides were not in operation. the toilets were dirty. the communication with the employees were non existent because they were just on their phone. the work ethic of the people working there was terrible very slow. the people at the ticket counter were racist and judgemental. the waiting time on average per ride was approximately 55 minutes. if you wanted an express ticket you will have to pay 498rm compared to standard 98rm. there was scammers at the electronic tickets box where you purchase standard tickets. been there 4x times in my entire life and it seems to be getting worse.

great family day out. best to stay the night to enjoy the whole place. like any amusement parks food prices can be a bit steep but still heaps of choices. hardly any queues on weekdays thus it s best to plan your day visit then. we chartered a lux people mover for 800 ringgit to take all 8 of us from bukit bintang stopping at an awesome local food court for breakfast then straight to genting the dfo and back to the hotel. 12hrs all toll fares included and the driver was a phone call away. be cautious on buying online as it does not state the days. the online purchases are only for the next day use. also heaps of illegal scalpers around offering cheaper tickets. purchase at your own risk.

the place is full of fun nostalgic and colorful atmosphere. but i had a bad experience leaving my mobile phone in a box at the ride. someone took my phone. due to their carelessness in not checking the item before taking it. luckily i saw it and asked for it back.

for the first i ve been visit genting skyworlds theme park very awesome place. but some games are not suitable for kid. its for group friendly which some game needs 4 to 8 person per games. i will repeat next time.
expensive tickets for outdoor theme park most rides have high waiting time. in whole day u can explore only few rides. shopping mall is good.

a very good experience with genting outdoor theme park. the person in charge of us fazira was very patient and answered all our questions with a smile. will definitely come back again. worth the experience!

the theme park offers fun rides and beautiful views and the indoor and outdoor areas mean there s something to enjoy in any weather. the shopping mall has a fantastic variety of stores from high end brands to local finds along with plenty of dining options. it does get crowded on weekends so plan ahead.

we recently visited skyworlds theme park and had a great time with our family. the place is beautiful very well maintained and extremely clean which immediately gives a refreshing and welcoming feel. it s truly one of the best spots for a family outing. we spent around 6 hours inside the park and enjoyed the atmosphere the views and the overall experience. unfortunately due to the extra crowd that day we couldn t take any rides but even then the environment itself was enjoyable enough to make our visit worth it. skyworlds is a perfect place for families looking for a fun clean and vibrant destination. we will definitely come back again hopefully on a less crowded day to enjoy the rides as well!

i ll admit i was quite skeptical about genting skyworlds at first especially after walking past the park entrance towards night at the museum the free walkthrough area after 6pm which always felt underwhelming compared to bigger theme parks like disneyland or universal studios. but last month i finally visited the park properly with a group of friends and it turned out to be a much better experience than expected! we went on a promotional price only for this year anniversary where adult tickets were only rm65 which was a great deal. the weather was cold and drizzly perfect for a cool theme park day but unfortunately we had to buy the park s branded raincoats at rm15 each. they were super thin flimsy and didn t even have buttons definitely overpriced for the quality but we had no choice unless we wanted to be drenched. despite the weather the park remained open two rides were closed for maintenance and as we explored further in i have to say it s easily the best outdoor theme park in malaysia. the different zones themed after fox movies were quite immersive with a good balance of thrill rides and family friendly options. tons of photo spots too! we only managed to go on four rides due to long queues. found out a bit late that you can actually use the genting app for virtual queues which would ve saved us a lot of time. favorite ride was the invasion of the planet of the apes setting so real dystopian and rides is immersive with well done 3d experience. alpha space was intense and fun though the ride flipping us 12 times i think? was a bit too much we d love if they toned that down a little 5 times feel just right had lunch at the ice age themed restaurant the biggest indoor eatery there. food was decent with a mix of asian and western options but we were hoping for more themed or character inspired dishes. the ice age acorn plush keychain was a cute souvenir and much more worth it compared to some of the other park s branded merch which felt overpriced for the design and quality. one small downside the park closes at 6pm which feels a bit early compared to other international parks. wish it can go till 7 or 8pm at least. overall genting skyworlds doesn t reach the level of disney or universal but it definitely deserves credit for the effort and experience it offers. would return again to try out the rides i missed!
fun place. would ve enjoyed more if the weather was good. went there and it was raining

first time to the skyworld theme park. its been a great experience for me and my family. good and friendly staff and a lot of nice sceneries and setup if you are a photo addict like me. the rides are really fun and many of the rides are kids friendly. i ll surely be back again because even 1 whole day here is not enough.

there are scary rides medium omes and easy ones that goes with shows that make it interesting. doesn t feel much but when it goes with them and show it feels exciting. best to wear socks and shoes here. certain activity need app booking and is best for lonq quee attraction as well. food wise here is okay at average level so is good rather than poor tasting food because it is monopolised by the theme park.

the theme park is pretty good i bought the vip service to skip the queue and join the tour for 3 hours and i enjoyed it very much. one thing need to take note is that the vip ticket is not a priority lane ticket they are different. and then another thing need to take note is that all rollercoasters outdoor are currently either in maintenance closed or not open due to certain circumstances i hope it will open soon but other than that it s pretty much worth to go the entertainment level could on par with uss in singapore

download the genting theme park app. you will need it for a relaxing day there s only one entrance through the mall that also have the indoor park the hotel entrance is not open independence day flying thearter a very good ride with pre show but the action that the middle is not at fun at when you just flying around. please get a virtual queue vq through the app cause the minimum wait with vq is about 20min so when you see the outside wait time said 20min is gonna be 40 at least. so if you come in the line sit down and wait. you can bring your bag in but no drink. please be careful if you re wearing slipper esd something the only ride that will only let you get in line if you have a vq a decent ride planet of the apes good theming at the queue but the ride is just 3d screens. maybe ride it like 1 2 time. the wait time is about 10 20min you will stop in one place for a long time because they let in a big group at a time drop tower you know if you wanna ride when you see it alpha fighter same as above boot camp is an obstacle course and will need a vq to get in any ride in the ice age land is a must maybe skip the log if the wait time is more than 20 . the dark ride is short but fun. the roller coaster is theme very nice and the ride is not too intense the 2 ride in the epic land will get you wet so bring a poncho. the wait time for the flying bird could be long some time but the boat ride is a must just watch out for your shoe the rio land have 2 kiddies ride and the longest wait time in the park. the samba gliders. the operations is quick and continuous but you have to rent a locker that cost min 20 ringit for 4hr why no option 10 ringit 2hr? but i think it a must cause the ride is long and take you around the park ride in the evening and you may fly through the moutain fog overal the park is very well kept most of the ride is clean and quick. but i really think that the park should do something quick about the 2 ride that never been open. either tear it down to make new one or find a way around to make it work like mad ramp peak they could open it up to the guest to come in walk around and take picture or reduce the speed of the ride so that it just a scenic ride along the rock they do have a small parade and some music show through out the day night at the museum was still close at the time we visit sad

the place was very crowded during the weekend you have to wait more than 1 hour for each game. you need to download a mobile application to make booking for the game you wish to play. you can find the application name in the pictures below. it is very large park so make sure to arrive there early to enjoy the games
amazing place to be on a perfect day . clouds rides atmosphere etc ..all great
first thing first get your vq for some popular games can save you a lot of waiting time. independence day is a must go.

very good. the 6d ride was one of me and my boy s favourites. it was so realistic even without 3d glasses. used vq to take rides that were overcrowded. but the 6d ride the queue and vq was too long and we had to wait for very long. just try to book vq early. recommended 10am in the morning go there. no people at that time. the jam usually starts in afternoon. also we saw the towering free fall tower. my boy was shocked by the tower and didn t want to go there. i recommend visiting the free fall tower somewhere in the middle of the theme park if you dare. and also take the samba glider acorn adventure and independence day defiance. those were the best ones.

time and money better spent elsewhere around kl... to ride the cable car alone took almost 1 hour from purchasing the ticket to actually riding the cable car. the queue is absurdly long... might as well build an escalator all the way up just like what china is able to. the rides also takes an average of 40 minutes queue each..!! more waste of time. the entrance fee to the park itself is rm168 malaysian and rm200 non malaysian ... just to experience long queues for rides.... for me this is great way to waste time and money. i had better experience at other theme parks near kl than this. you can experience this youself if you wish. i for one not going to repeat this mistake again in the future.

i m super disappointed with this theme park. the app and booking system are confusing tbh. i booked a ride slot but when we queued they told us my partner wasn t included even though we bought our tickets together from klook i mean how wud we know???. there was no clear explanation or guidance on how the booking works. and we want to book again no rides is available so technically the booking is a hit or miss. the queue management was even worse. they kept prioritising people who successfully booked through the app so the normal line didn t move at all. also theres a ride that we waited almost 2 hours only for it to suddenly close and we were asked to leave. apparently they had already paused it earlier too. kalau rosak then just close it halamak. management shud take this seriously instead of wasting visitors time. ouh and i forgot to mention there s a few rides that werent even operating too. overall very poor customer time management and communication. definitely expected better for the ticket price.

be ready for the long queues but trust me the rides and atmosphere make it all worth it! the park is full of energy themed zones are gorgeous and the thrills will have you grinning all day. just bring patience and maybe comfy shoes
this is amazing. worth every penny. the temperature was very pleasant around 22 degrees centigrade. the themes were too good very well managed.

visited for indoor theme park only with online bought pass ticket. i couldn t get any fresh cool air although i was 1 600 high peak area. no way to outside area at all theme park itself was quite good but never recommend to go only indoor park mall area. and please note that main roller coaster is not working now. better to stay at klcc malls

worst theme park ever we visited. very limited rides n attractions. every ride waiting time more than 2 hours. over crowded n no proper management to control visitors. crowd almost 10 time more then park capacity. most of rides out of service. overall waste of money.

in short not so worth it unless you re fine with waiting time that can go up to 60 70mins just for 2 3mins of rides during the weekend. if you re visiting i recommend to buy the 18inch hotdog as the price is reasonable enough for theme park.
recommended place to have a great play time with the kids mostly rides can take above height 100cm. the queue still normal and some rides available for rsv with apps to save more time.

visited on 28 january. overall the experience was good. although a few attractions were closed due to the weather it was understandable. however one malay female staff member at the planet of the apes exit point could use additional training as she was quite rude when responding to a guest s question.

1. the queue for each ride averages at 50 minutes each we only chose to ride for kid s ride above 110 cm for our 5 years old son . not much my family and i can play from 10 am to 6 pm. perhaps due to many rides that are unavailable hence the park management may consider to make available and open all other rides soonest to reduce waiting time in average too congested 2. should add more chairs around the park 3. limited number of cafe and stall that sell food that opens 4. even the restaurants are not in proper condition and is too crowded. need to open more restaurant to distribute the crowds 5. the toilets are filthy and not well taken care of 6. people are skipping queues especially at the planet of the apes ride 7. the vq is confusing as no clear instruction of how to use them 8. bring back the express pass. more straightforward than the vq 9. train your staff better. lots of staff seems unprofessional as they were having conversation among them in front of the customers who are queueing. many are also rough with their voice tone like shouting when giving instruction to move forward and appeared to be generally unfriendly no smiles nor greetings at all 10. your apps accuracy is high however with standard errors about 5 to 10 minutes 11. the timing for operation may be considered to be extended such that to open much earlier at 9 00 am and to closes much later at 8 00 pm. given the average high waiting time 8 hours passes very fast rest meals in between prayers toilet break etc. 12. outdoor park ticket price is a bonus. please keep the price relatively affordable so that many malaysian can afford to attend the theme park.

if it is your first time visit then please plan in advance. same day price is expensive and discount available on online portal is on online booking only. if it s the same day then maybe you can find discounts on the red bus app. at least more than half is required. very long ques. to save yourself from ques use their mobile app and book a time slot of the ride using a virtual queue option. it s beautiful themed park. there are only 4 5 very nice rides others are normal or seems for kids only. if you are leaving using cable car then please use buffer of 1.5 hour there were very long ques.

the theme park is great! bought the tickets online for a cheaper price and downloaded the app for the virtual queue. i managed to take 10 rides in total from 12pm 6pm here. overall it s a great experience and the weather is cold throughout the day. plenty of sitting area and free drinking fountain. food options are wide as well. sadly the cafe at the ice age part wasn t open duringy visit. i love to go there for my lunch. downside during peak season visit all the lockers will be taken very soon. i only have 2 person belongings but was left to take the big locker which costs rm50 for the entire day. we also had to travel a long way to the other entrance as the main entrance has been closed.

had an amazing time. enjoyed most rides especially the acorn and up down thingy. i managed to get virtual ques for some which was a great feature the queue for acorn was 2 hours for 2 min of fun. food there is typically expensive and honestly not worth it. except the hot dog near the entrance was good again for rm18 the experience was great and so was the performance. lockers are exorbitant at rm27 and only paid that because acorn ride had a no loose bag policy you cannot store unfortunately though you should like other rides although its always full so what are you gonna do. admittedly i got the anniversary promotion for rm60 so i think it s money well spent.

horrible! absolutely horrible! this is not the place you should go during your trip to genting highlands. anywhere else is fine and great for a holiday. but this place is absolute garbage. not only do they charge over rm160 for one singular ticket entry for just 1 day which is around 10am 6pm. they also have long queues terrible system skyworlds app and a horrible control of time. everything was so confusing. i was here for more than 4 hours and didn t get on a single ride. several bookings of rides of mine got cancelled for no reason and you re limited to 3 bookings per ticket afterwards you re forced to queue up in the boring line that takes over 3 4 hours if you re not careful with timing. do not come here. it s a hell of a place to be. i would give 0 stars if i could.

dont bother coming if the weather is pouring.. queue 1 hr then rain and stop and rain again... went in from 2pm to 6pm didn t even get to take a single ride. asked for rain voucher compensation they mentioned rain must be continuous only compensation is given. the issue is the queue on weekends is so long easily min 1hr then rain for another 40 50mins. had to queue all over again. in the end zero rides for my entire family. what a waste of money and time.
the place is amazing especially for kids or families due to its attractions.i recommend
amisha is soo friendly and answer all our question patiently. the vip ticket is soooo worth to buy!

disappointing experience not recommended i wouldn t recommend this theme park and here s why the overall atmosphere lacked joy and energy. it felt like the staff were just going through the motions not genuinely enjoying their work. only one staff member greeted me with a smile which stood out because it was the only warm interaction i had. many of the rides were not operating which made this already small park feel even more limited and underwhelming. it felt more like a half functioning fairground than a proper theme park. to make matters worse the virtual reservation system cancelled my booking without explanation and customer service was unable to help. i ended up missing a ride i was really looking forward to. several food and entertainment stalls were also closed adding to the sense that the park wasn t fully operational. if you ve been to a well run full scale theme park before you re likely to find this one a waste of both time and money.

the outdoor theme park is well laid out has decent rides and shows and one can easily spend half a day enjoying the various rides with family. it isn t the largest theme park nor does it have the best rides but whatever it has can keep a family happily occupied for a few hours. the indoor theme park is quite average and not as enjoyable.

i am very suprised and happy. ellya is soo nice soft kind and warm in guiding us during the vip trip the best ever guide! i ve never expected to won the special guest of 1mth for visiting genting skyworld in 2025. me my husband and my siblings really enjoyed the once in a lifetime experience. really appreciated the kind celebration and gesture from genting. thank you so much genting!

a lot of the stations have both indoor and outdoor areas which is better for me. i think it s the best choice because you can really feel the cool temperature. moreover it is worth the money. last but not least if you are new to the theme park i suggest booking online because it is cheaper and more affordable compared to buying physical tickets. don t forget to scan your digital ticket when entering. try to visit on weekdays to avoid the crowd.

highly overrated park the app and real time don t match app isnt intuitive either but a must for many rides. what we found was if in the app 5 mins means 15 mins 15 mins means 30mins 30 mins means more than 1 hour. we enjoyed the beauty and effort the park has been built upon and the nature s basket. rides not worthy of the charged price.
