we ve been to skyworld theme park four times now and it s always a fun experience! we usually go on weekdays so the crowd is a bit more manageable. the park isn t huge which is great because you can cover everything in a day without feeling rushed. must ride attractions? definitely the independence day ride it s super fun and totally worth the hype! don t miss epic you will get wet so bring a raincoat or buy one there samba glider long queue alert try to reserve in advance! and acorn adventure if you re into roller coasters. food wise there are a few options inside the park. we tried the two restaurants one near samba glider and the other by ice age. food was just okay nothing amazing but enough to recharge you for more rides. pro tip most rides require you to store your bags so rent a locker early. there are plenty available around the park. also make use of the virtual queue vq system to reserve rides though note sometimes the vq still requires you to queue for quite a while. we waited over 30 mins for independence day despite using vq and ended up missing our slot for acorn adventure. bit of a letdown so plan accordingly. all in all it s a great theme park with its own charm. it s not disneyland and that s okay. it s set up in the mountains and some rides even give you beautiful views of nature which is a cool and unique touch. come with the right expectations enjoy the fresh air and have fun!

genting skyworlds theme park has many rides and games suitable to all ages. kids will love to play the games available at the sidewalks and the kiddy rides there. we bought our tickets in advance from klook price is cheaper than you buy directly over there. a number of food vendors are available inside the theme park as well. weather is cold there don t forget to wear a jacket.

i paid 3 tickets online for me and my sons. i arrived in morning to outdoor theme park . however we couldn t ride more than two rides because of long lines and the 3rd rides we walk a way after we reach half way because we waited 75 minutes while it s written the estimated waiting is 40 minutes and it took us 75 minutes to reach halfway and the park will close soon the long waiting really destroyed the fun and it doesn t worth it even though the place is beautiful and the weather is nice if anyone wants to go he she should upgrade the ticket to vip or do not go
i understand the ticket price drop as some of the rides were unavailable. the independence day ride is a must try. just don t forget to use the app to skip the long queues.

exhilarating theme park. we could manage only few rides because of the time constraints. but i tell you kids will love it. better to plan an entire day so that you can enjoy all the rides at a decent pace. i enjoyed ice age ride very much. it was nothing short of amazement. my wife liked independence day ride. it s just another out of the world experience. better to purchase shower protection coats that are available there as it can get cloudy by evening and some rides sprinkle water for that 4d effect. decent food options. staff are very helpful. some rides need a prior reservation like planet of the apes ride. do check with the advance booking
have awesome vip tour with our tour guide erin. credit to her and genting theme park staffs.

genting highlands is an amazing destination with a perfect blend of entertainment nature and adventure. the cool weather adds to the charm making it a great escape from the city heat. the skyway cable car ride offers breathtaking views and the indoor and outdoor theme parks provide endless fun for all ages. the casinos shopping malls and restaurants offer a wide range of experiences ensuring there s something for everyone. whether you re looking for thrill rides scenic landscapes or a relaxing getaway genting highlands is a must visit in malaysia!

i would like to formally express my disappointment regarding the staff member managing the sambal glider today. i walked in with a small sling bag and was instructed to place it in a locker. i completely understand that policies exist for a reason. what i did not expect however was the unnecessarily condescending attitude that came with it. when i politely mentioned that just last week i visited and was not required to store my bag i was met with a rather defensive response highlighting that she had been working there for a long time. i was unaware that length of service now substitutes basic courtesy and professionalism. if experience is meant to enhance customer service standards this interaction unfortunately reflected the opposite. being firm about rules is understandable being rude about them is not. as a guest of genting i expected better treatment. this experience was disappointing frustrating and far from the standard one would associate with a reputable establishment. he is malay guy wearing a sunglasses and acting like he is the owner of genting. i trust this matter will be addressed appropriately.

good to spend a whole day. kids got a 20 rm voucher. the staff said can spend outside. don t listen to them. spend inside cos as soon as you leave can t spend. the kids tried to spend at the indian food places right opp the entrance and they reject. hope this helps others. plz buy tickets online in advance to get discount.

we visited genting skyworlds theme park in early august 2025 on a saturday. the park was crowded with many tourists from china and india. the queue for the cable car from awana resort to the theme park took about 40 minutes at around 10 am. for the return trip the queue was even longer approximately 60 minutes at 4 pm and it gets even more congested between 5 to 7 pm. the theme park entrance ticket when used with the app allows you to access three games with a virtual queue system which requires booking about three hours in advance. for popular games without using the virtual queue the wait time can exceed one hour. as for food it is quite expensive starting at rm30 per portion.

we underestimated the size of the theme park. this place feels magical! the weather makes it even better! we had fun! there are rides that cater to both kids and adults. attractions are also assigned to a movie theme. we managed to catch some shows and ride almost everything as there was no waiting time during our visit friday january 2024 ! carnival games are available inside the theme park with separate charges as well. we enjoyed ourselves and we will definitely visit again in the future! get your tickets in advance online for a better deal!

visited here with vip experience together with family having so much fun and the vip treatment is great with vip lounge access and refreshments no queues on rides free printed photos ice cream and popcorns and lastly a great tour by ms hernie thank you for the best vip experience we will be back soon in the future

genting outdoor theme park the outdoor park seems to be trying to create a san francisco vibe i guess it leaning into a retro 80s feel. it s got wild spin rides you ll want to hit before eating plus some decent food trucks for a quick snack. this place seems to bring back a lot of childhood memories for many so it s definitely family oriented. however from what i ve observed quite a few rides are pretty intense and have height restrictions. i guess there s also an area more suited for little kids to enjoy!

service very slow. queue for 2 hours 30 minutes for a ride then? when you come and see how the people work here. one rides should be 4 person but 2 seats is empty? is a 2 by 2 seats so another 2 seats is for?? decoration??? if u work like this everyone wait like stupid downstairs. and before u come in they tell u only wait for 60 90 minutes. keep show technical issues?? i joined vq but either show me is filled or show me booked then cancelled my time. especially for rio i joined vq then come and when i reached told me technical issues. when it come bck to functioned it show me i cannot book anytime anymore. then i only can join the normal queue. i asked the lady how long i need to queue for estimate she say 60 90 minutes who know i start queue from 3 until 6 something then finally ended. the vq i planned behind can t joined anymore. really disappointed. so many technical issues none of them is fixed nicely. either stuck in a queue due to technical issue for an hour or just cancelled your vq suddenly and can t rejoined. technical issue is not from me how come cancel my vq. you should place it in next vq once the ride come back but not just cancel and asked me to queue for 3 hours for a game and lots of rides is only half filled

went during weekdays it was raining so we had to be careful to not slipped going around. we managed to get a ride in ice age which by the way is actually quite fast. as someone who never rode one it was very thrilling and abit concerning since i was practically swayed a lot lol. didn t puke though i d recommend trying it. also went to the independence day defiance sort of a simulation for airship. there s an intro for about 5 minutes but the waiting time was too long. it was okay i feel like there s something better to do though. my friends went and tried andromeda base while i rest it did took them 30 minutes in line and they had the ride for about 5 minutes they seemed to had fun and they said it wasn t scary at all. after an hour most of the things around us were close most likely due to rain. female customers were having difficult time to find a nearby toilet the female toilet near the ice age was closed and they had to use the disabled oku toilet instead
fun and exciting place to be with either friends or family. suggested you go on weekdays with less crowds. use cable car ride instead of parking at the top hill.

i had an amazing time at genting skyworlds theme park! the park is super well designed clean and full of exciting rides for all ages. the atmosphere feels magical from the moment you walk in with great music beautiful decorations and friendly staff everywhere. the roller coasters and themed areas are top notch and i especially loved how everything was so organized from the queue system to the food stalls. the views from the top are breathtaking and the cool mountain weather makes the experience even better. definitely a must visit if you re in genting highlands worth every minute and every penny! can t wait to come back again!

not the best theme park i ve been too. very little rides and most are out of service. there are some adrenaline rushing rides in a small number and the price is highly unreasonable for them. we couldn t experience most of the rides though due to some service issue . weather is nice and all that sure but for the price and the limitation of rides. i definitely do not recommend this theme park.

the rides were really thrilling... until you stayed in line for over an hour and the ride breaks down. as a matter of fact when i visited the outdoor park only had like about 4 5 rides that are available. the others were either constantly breaking down or have crazy lines that end in the rode breaking down. absolutely horrible experience.
super duper enjoyable vip tour as usual with syakir and running into the super friendly helpful supervisor of his ellya made it a pleasant surprise will definitely be back again as usual
very nice and exciting place in kuala lumpur including everything like shopping malls resorts hotels and apartments theme park restaurants and many amenities. best place to visit.
i will come again the room is wonderful location is great definitely revisit

theme park is goos surrounding. weather is cold and nice luckily is not raining. have virtual queue in app. but still needs too wait for about 20 min for fave ride. have food and drinks resto and booth. toilets need attention for cleaning because sometimes floor is wet and dirty.

the themepark itself is fun and exciting. there are multiple themes for the rides and you should try each of it. there was a light rain so some rides were closed but the chilly vibe was pretty and cool too especially during the cable car ride.

first and probably last visit. queue times were insanely long we spent over an hour just for one ride and most of the day waiting instead of enjoying. many rides were closed or kept breaking down and even the virtual queue system was buggy and fully booked within minutes. staff looked overwhelmed and park hours are too short 11am 6pm to make it worth the price. the theme and weather were nice but overall not worth the stress or money. hope they seriously improve the operations

the theme park was a lot more fun than i expected! we spent the whole day there and enjoyed almost all the rides. i do wish there were more small vendors serving hot snacks though. and more vegetarian options as one of my friends is a vegetarian and options were very limited. the soft serve ice cream was really nice. didn t stay at the hotel so can t comment.

booked the vip tour we had hernie as our guide she was absolutely phenomenal. she was really patient super insightful about the history and specifics of the park and just general knowledge about the rides. one of the folks in our group had an issue with being motion sick during the preamble for the 4d ride and she helped him leave without any issues which we appreciated immensely . hernie is an all star and we were super happy to have her for our guided tour a phenomenal guide and just generally cheerful individual.

almost every zone was closed as it was raining. i understand that outdoor activities are not possible but all indoor activities were closed too. there was no one at kisok to warn about the closure. only after i bought the ticket which was not refundable the lady at counter asked are you sure you want to go as it is raining and everything is closed

firdaus ash was an excellent vip experience guide! it was a seamless experience we managed to go for every single ride and took the ones that we liked twice! ash was super friendly and i would highly recommend the vip experience with him.. would definitely go again. thank youuuu so much!
buy ticket in advance from klook geeting discount and use virtual que to save time

since the day the skyworld theme park was opened i have heard a lot of unfavourable and some even very negative review of this outdoor park. the comments were mostly about how small the place is few rides not much in the park and not worth the price of the entrance ticket. well last weekend i finally decided to see the place for myself and see how bad it is. and i must say all the negatives are untrue at least not now. the place is definitely worth the price paid. i was prepared to take a quick stroll enjoy perhaps a couple of rides and that s it...i am done! that wasn t the case. i stayed from 11am 6pm. all the rides many were opened and they were very interesting and fun rides. there were street performances and they created an upbeat and holiday feel to the park. the ambience was fun and enjoyable and the weather was cool. the place has the disneyland feel and in my opinion so much better than some of our neighbouring theme parks. if you haven t been you should go and see for yourself. it is a wonderful theme park!!!

we took vip access and had an amazing experience. adib was assigned to us for the whole day and was very attentive to our needs especially since we had a small baby with us. the service was efficient and well organized. even though there was another family with us he personalized the experience to suit each family s needs. we managed to try almost all the rides especially the famous ones and we even skipped the express lane. definitely worth it and we will surely come again! thank you genting skyworld team!

genting skyworlds theme park is an exciting place with lots of cool rides and attractions. it s great for both kids and adults with thrilling roller coasters and fun family rides. the views from up in the mountains add a unique touch to the whole experience! definitely worth the visit!

one of the worst crowd control i have seen. they know its over capacity yet they allow visitors to enter and buy tickets. just pure capitalism. waiting time for for 1 ride is 2 3 hours. not worth your time and experience.

we visited the park on a wednesday and the crowd was not too much so we could get into a few rides without a long queue however right from the start there were a few rides which were closed due to technical issues. in the middle of the day more rides were closed on and off due to technical issues. there was an instance where we queued almost 40mins for the famous independence day ride and as it was getting to our turn the ride experienced a technical issues and the staffs forced all the people in the queue to stop waiting and leave the attraction and ard 30 mins later the ride was up again and we had to re queue for it wasted a lot of our time for that. there was also 2 instance where we used our virtual queue for the samba gliders and ice age expedition thin ice rides and when it was almost time for us to go for the ride the ride closed due to technical issues and we had to cancel our virtual queue and re book for other rides but by then a lot of rides is fully booked or temporary closed due to technical issues which caused us to waste our virtual queue attempts. all in all the rides were fun if they were working sadly it seems most of the rides in the theme park have technical issues and can break down anytime which is a big bummer if you travelled all the way here only to have alot of the park s attraction unavailable.

this was definitely the most unforgettable experience of my life. i can t believe i m saying this but this place gave me the universal studios vibe. i ve been to both places and i can say that this place might actually be one of my favourite theme park. the place is nicely designed based on each theme. the park offers a perfect blend of thrilling and impressive attractions. they definitely did a good job in designing those attractions. one of the things that left me stunned was the breathtaking view. i d honestly recommend wearing a sweater because it is freezing especially on rainy seasons. the place is 6000 ft! however i absolutely hate the queues at every attraction. in addition everything was kind of pricey and some rides were closed. nevertheless i love it!! it s the perfect place to spend time with family.

had an incredible time at genting skyworlds. the cool mountain breeze makes it so much more comfortable than other parks and the world building in each zone is impressive. pro tip definitely bring a raincoat or poncho! some rides will get you wet. you don t want to be shivering in the cold after a water splash. poncho is a bit pricy up here..

genting skyworlds was such a fun and refreshing experience! the ride variety was great and i loved how each zone had its own theme and vibe. the weather up in the highlands made the whole day even more enjoyable. overall it s a fantastic place to spend a full day with family or friends.

this is my first time leaving sri lanka and visiting a theme park in a different country. it s definitely worth the price i paid! despite the heat it didn t hinder my enjoyment of the place. the cable car ride was an amazing experience so beautiful and fun. this place will be a core memory for me. although the rides are extreme overall it has given me an awesome experience. recently all water activities have been temporary closed in the outdoor area apr2024

this theme park was meant to be a 20th century fox theme park but when disney bought 20th century fox over the theme park lost its license rights but it nearly completed when it happened so fortunately they were allowed to keep most of the themed rides identity. having said that the park is managed very well giving a vibe as good as any disney park but at a smaller scale because of the size of the park and not anything else. regular live performances are great and the management of rides are very good. notable rides included the independence day ride and scrat s 4d ride. food is a little pricey but merch is very affordable. ticket price are presently on promotion so it s a good time to visit since genting is celebrating its jubilee celebration. there is more space for other rides and i think several rides were closed and some coming soon.

q for 1.5 hours even with vq and the ride was so short. only tried 2 rides and called it a day bcs i ve been in on my feet waiting in line for a total of almost 3 hours and both rides sucks. toilets and lockers were quite far away between each one.
totally love this place! cold weather and spectacular views.

rides werent anything special kinda expensive entry for tourists 200 myr . some of the rides were quite uncomfortable sudden turns didnt feel great on the neck . overall i found the vertical drop ride to be the most thrilling. a good thing was that there werent many people so the wait times were quite short.

extremely crowded because there were only 5 6 good rides operational so the people were struck on those rides waiting lines for literally 1 hour or 1.5 hours!! they should add more rides so that crowd is scattered on other rides as well and the waiting time is lesser. even the shops and cafes inside the theme parks were half closed or not operational.

only a few rides available around 4 5 were still under construction . thankfully i went when there wasnt a lot of crowds hence i only queued a maximum of 10min each per ride most rides were only a 5min wait . enjoyed the low crowd season and there is also a virtual queue to queue beforehand managed to bypass quite a few of the longer queues because of it rides wasnt super scary but i still had fun!

the only good thing about this place is air condition like weather walk in non malaysian cost 198 myr with 3 virtual queue. if you want to go don t forget to purchase 1 day in advance. locker for 4 hr cost 20 myr. genting app doesn t work properly. the queue is very long for a ride but not worth it.

had a great time there. we bought the vip ticket and totally worth it. every ride has huge queue but the vip ticket we crossed the queue without any issues also our guide mr yusri bin ramli was so kind and helpful. we were lucky to have him highly recommend

the theming of the park is really stunning equal to the universal parks in the world. unfortunately the 2 big coasters never opened because the manufacturer went bankrupt and will probably never open in the future. operations are bad and many rides stay closed during the day without any notification why. crew members are not informing and don t seem to care. all together we had a good experience and the prices for food and souvenirs were really good!
tour guide ash is the best. an excellent tour guide who made the trip enjoyable and informative. worth every penney spent. thank you ash

worth every ringgit! i booked the vip experience at genting skyworlds and it was absolutely amazing! from the moment we arrived the staff treated us so well friendly attentive and very professional. having a vip guide made the whole day so smooth no long queues everything was perfectly planned according to what we wanted to try. the rides were so much fun the park was clean and well maintained and the little extra perks priority access locker snacks and photos really made us feel special. definitely recommend the vip ticket if you want a stress free and memorable experience at genting skyworlds. will come again for sure!

it was an okay theme park. my main comment is that the app was laggy and several rides kept shutting down after just a few runs due to technical issues. for us it was the acorn ride and the esd defender that experienced repeated malfunctions. i ve been to numerous theme parks around the world i.e. france the uk singapore japan and none had as many technical problems as this one. if this is the norm the park is in serious need of a revamp. on the bright side you can complete the entire park in a day which is convenient. i m glad i visited during the promotional period because i wouldn t be willing to pay full price for this level of quality. i got my ticket from klook roughly rm66. the food price is typical for a theme park. a good meal costs around rm20 25 but the portion is huge. this isn t an issue for me but might be for some. i went on a wednesday and the waiting time ranges from 5 40 minutes depending on the ride. the crowd builds up through the evening. make sure to sync your ticket on their app and use the 3 virtual queue option. i m a thrill seeker and when the waiting time hits 5min we ran to that ride. this is my must ride list acorn adventure ice age suspended coaster with splash rivet town roller robots compact spinning coaster samba gliders rio aerial glider coaster with park views alpha fighter pilots andromeda 360 spinning fighter jets esd global defender central park aerial spinning thrill ride terraform tower challenge andromeda free fall tower finale

genting highlands is a popular holiday place in malaysia. it is located on a mountain so the weather is cool and fresh. many people visit to relax and enjoy the beautiful view. there are many fun activities to do. you can visit theme parks shopping malls and restaurants. families and friends can enjoy games and rides together. at night the lights are very beautiful. overall genting highlands is a nice place for a short trip. it is suitable for people who want cool weather and fun entertainment.

genting skyworlds where the real ride is the queue parked up paid of course walked through genting skyworlds hotel like a movie star just to reach the ticket counter rm130 and no discount even for being cute. the weather? post rain chill and misty like a horror film intro. but hey at least they didn t shut the rides down. heard rain no fun so i dodged a wet bullet. the crowd? packed tighter than a sardine in a school trip. every ride had a queue that made me question my life choices. you know it s wild when standing in line becomes your main activity. rides? not a lot. enough to tease but not enough to please. most seem made for the kiddos. adults just stand around pretending they re chill but inside they crying design wise though chef s kiss. felt like walking through a hollywood movie set with mist for special effects. the mummy themed zone? that was my jam. the rest... mmm not so much. verdict great place to walk wait and wonder why you re still queuing. don t expect to ride everything twice unless you got magical crowd repelling powers. would i go again? only if they let me skip the lines or i come back as a 10 year old. logan was here paid full price just to become a queue master.

went in to skyworlds theme park when they open for free after 6pm. it was raining in the afternoon so we decided not to buy the regular tickets and this proved to be a wise decision. i don t think it is worth to pay rm189 just to go in and take some rides. places are nice to take pictures and weather is cooling but that is all about it. and the food inside is horrendously expensive. still since it is free then no harm take a walk around the park.
skyworld theme park old town and mini mart just a walk away with great views of mountain peaks

you need to go early when they open the rides are not so packed peak hours at 1 2pm. so embrace yourself for the waiting time to be an hour or more. plus good food staff are mostly friendly. not the worth for vip experience too expensive in my opinion. just buy the regular ticket or buy in third party websites like klook etc. great discounts you can have
pretty cool experience high in the mountains. tickets are too expensive though.

the most memorable tourist destination when visiting malaysia. i am absolutely in love with this place! a very cool place lots of beautiful scenery and of course lots of rides that are very exciting and must try. for those of you who want to visit genting skyworlds you should download the application and book tickets online. so you don t have to queue for long to ride the rides you want. i m actually afraid and easily dizzy if i ride extreme rides but it s a pity if it s missed. so like it or not i still tried it and it turned out to be very exciting! the most memorable ride is independence day where the ride presents the excitement and super realistic 8d experience. i felt like i was riding a fighter plane and saving the world hahaha! hopefully one day i can come back to this beautiful place and try more rides.

from the moment we arrived we were treated like royalty. our guide amisha was not only incredibly knowledgeable but also warm friendly and extremely accommodating. she made sure every detail was taken care of such as skipping lines and knowing whether which rides are open due to the weather which was light rain today. what made the vip experience truly special was the access we had to the park s most popular rides without waiting. in one day we covered more attractions than we could have in three regular days no stress no rushing just pure fun! if you re looking to make the most of your time at the park and enjoy a truly seamless luxury experience the vip tour is absolutely worth it. it turned a great day into an unforgettable one. highly recommend! lastly another thank you to amisha again for making our day very enjoyable.

it s a fun experience here. the weather is cooling like 23 25degc. do install the skyworld app scan yr tix qr get the virtual q no. ahead of time. avoid wasting time to quene. virtual q will run out so act fast. buy entrance ticket one day ahead online is cheaper. actual day ticket price for non malaysian is rm 198 for 1 day pass.
nice place.. but you need a full day to at least play a bit. as most rides takes at least 20 30min waiting in queue .. so tiring

we were told five hours is enough. in my personal opinion spending a whole day here is sufficient or even two days. rides are fabulous. some rides were not working and some were still under construction but all in all a good day was spent there. plenty of things activities to choose from.

i was looking forward to visit the theme park but it was a big disappointment. very limited number of rides a lot of them closed for no reason the ones which were open had long queues. even for the carousel i was in queue for over 20 minutes. the few good ones had wait times of over an hour. the concept of the park is good but unfortunately it lacks good management. the theme park was the main reason for my travel to genting but i only spent an hour there and had to exit due to closed rides and super long wait times.

we visited the park and while it is relatively small the waiting times for the rides ranged from 30 to 50 minutes even though we were on a thursday not weekend. the rides themselves are quite short compared to the time spent queuing. one thing that stood out during our visit was the behavior of some locals. unfortunately we experienced instances where malaysian staff or visitors were impolite toward tourists often raising their voices. this was surprising considering the high number of tourists the country receives. we felt that better hospitality and respect toward visitors would significantly improve the overall experience.

we played almost all of the activities. it was an awesome place! the rides were scary but fun! i highly recommend rivet town rollers samba gliders and acorn adventures. for all ages young middle old you must try independence day defiance and epic mission to moonhaven.

not very big area but attractions are mostly great. but some rides often got maintenance. had to wait inside the age of defender for abt 15 mins to fix problem. tha planet of the apes alos got maintenance only after we rode it. so we could not ride again. very smart to choose this area to build theme park as this place is so cool

not easy to rate this park.i will give 4 stars because i love theme parks. it s definitely a beautiful park the looks etc. are amazing looks like your classic american theme park. the big problem is there are not enough rides and nearly not a single ride which is exciting for adults. so if you have small kids it can be pretty cool for adults there is nothing. but the whole park feels very well maintained and super secure.
best best the weather the park n everything. a must go place. enjoyed to max.

we enjoyed our family time at the theme park and we are glad we bought the annual pass. the weather is good and there are rides and things to do for all ages. it is probably best to put up a night in genting. enjoy the outdoors and time spend with family. the xmas theme is fun and entertaining and the fake snow theme is also a great experience for the whole family.

amazing place to be in. but take note it s mostly rides for kids. so it s super kids friendly even the roller coaster . adult wanting to do extreme rides won t be available maybe only 1 2 rides which turns you upside down or shooting up . rides which i definitely recommend that might get the adults a little more excited is 1. independents day 10 10 2. acorn adventure 8 10 3. planet of the apes 8.5 10 4. samba gliders 8 10 have fun and enjoy great place for photos too get your tickets on klook or pelago recommended to buy in advance download the genting skyworld app to skip q
this trip is so fun and good experience. the tour guide name batrisya is good and kind. i will come back again

genting theme park is about 1 hour drive 15 min cable car ride from kuala lumpur. outdoor theme park is the main one. do book online tickets one day in advance to get it at 130 otherwise the price there for 1 adult is 198. remember it s a cash free zone so you need to have your credit card for all kind of payments. make sure weather is ok before booking because if it rains most of the rides get closed and it becomes very windy and cold. the indian restaurant sold out there can offer you some discount on entry provided you have lunch there. you can easily spend 4 5 hours. getting cab is easy on return. overall i will rate bana hills in vietnam better than genting any day.

apr 2025 2nd time to this theme park! still love a few rides like epic acorn independence day and loving new rides like terraform tower planet of the apes! we entered around 1025am and managed to complete the rides we wanted exclude kid rides by 6pm amazing! plan is to clear all outdoor rides in case of rain bad weather. during entering we were told to scan our qr tix and what s new is they captured our fingerprint as well so that we can exit enter again later on. we started with esd global defender lvl 1 highest thrill ride not operational during rainy days . extreme ride for a warmup! we then tried sid s rock and slide. next the cloud was a bit dark so we went to epic voyage to moonhaven ride with our raincoats prepared indoor and a lil outdoor may close during rainy days as well . we took this ride twice as there were no q and we wanted to fully utilize our disposable raincoat. then we went to samba gliders and then blue sky carousel to chill for a while. next we went to ice age expedition thin ice which has a super long q. finally acorn adventure is open and we super enjoyed the ride! we then went to alpha fighter pilot do take note the rides will have upside down . after clearing all the extreme rides we had lunch at buck s cafe. food is expected to be expensive and soso but no choice lah. we then continued with zeppelins ride to chill after lunch and then tried planet of the apes ride we were lucky it was drizzling while we enjoyed the indoor ride . next we went to rivet town roller and enjoyed own spinning and screaming during the ride. the q for terraform dropped from 50min to 15min so we went to try this and loved it!! last but not least we used our 1st virtual q for independence day. we skipped some rides like rio carnaval chaos mammoth fun zone boot camp training. too bad night at the museum was unavailable. july 2022 it is open like finally!!! need to record down this date july 27th 2022. who doesn t love a theme park right?! however the rides are quite limited so there was a promotion on the ticket price. we were lucky there was no rain and not many people q ing for the rides as it is a wednesday. definitely need luck to play in the park no rain and no heavy mist and rides to be available . terraform tower challenge was unfortunately not available. our 1st ride was samba gliders nice to get an aerial view of the whole park. try to sit in front for a more thrilling ride. 2nd was alpha fighter pilots andromeda base highly recommended. next we tried rivet town roller it was nice and then bigweld s zeppelins just to chill for a while can skip if you are looking for very thrilling rides. independence day defiance is highly recommended it was awesome. after that we tried esd global defender nice but not thrilling compared to other rides. after that we went to night at the museum midnight mayhem they have very nice decoration but the ride is a bit boring. we then q ed for acorn adventure but there was a technical issue so we left for sid s rock and slide which was only so so. epic voyage to moonhaven very highly recommended but will be 50 soaked with water. we brought our raincoat along so it was okay and fun! went for lunch and came back again in the evening for acorn adventure this is highly recommended!! overally it was a great experience and can t wait for the theme park to be fully opened since many of the rides are still not available. p s remember to install the genting skyworld app which is very useful for map free photos and virtual q pass. remember to bring raincoat too!
went on saturday fairly lots of people. used vq from genting apps really easy to use and still can redeem after the allocated time if the ride is temporarily unavailable.

excellent vip tour guide adik syakir! we had an amazing vip experience at genting skyworlds thanks to our wonderful tour guide adik syakir. he was extremely professional friendly attentive and very knowledgeable throughout the entire experience. everything was handled smoothly and efficiently with zero stress. he made sure we were always comfortable guided us perfectly through the fast lanes and ensured we fully enjoyed every ride. his service truly reflected top class vvip hospitality. highly recommended and we would definitely request him again in the future. thank you so much adik syakir!

going for the vip experience does have its benefits. our ambassador rais was indeed a good assistance and very well equipped and informed regarding the attractions. i would strongly recommend going for the vip experience if you are travelling with kids as the attractions will have long queues.

best to go during weekday. the park were closed on tuesday and every 18th of the month is genting membership day where you can earn up to 8x points when you shop and eat. we bought annual pass at rm 280 today and we have the bonus of continuing the date until 31st dec 2025 instead of oct. it s really a good deal if you come to the park over 2 times. this annual pass enabled you to go out of the park and comes back in unlimited and gives you 3 virtual queue in apps to queue in each visit. totally recommended! the outdoor thrill ride usually close when it is too foggy or raining. i highly recommend the ice age acorn roller coaster. please do note that you must not carry backpack hand bag scarf hat shades to the ride. they don t have temporary storage for you even and ask you to go buck s cafe beside there s a locker place where you pay additional rm 20 to keep your stuff for 4hrs. you can open and use again repeatedly during the rental. it is truly thrilling especially the last loop where you enter total blackness. the g force and speed and twist is totally crazy and worth it. another recommendation ride is esd where the ride is super immersive. best to sit in middle row for best experience. all my rides today were less than 5 mins queue. do download their apps for their virtual queue which is like express pass in universal studio. the food sold inside the park was so so and not so yummy. both my visit samba glide were out of service hopefully will open when i come again.
fantastic rides better than disney land breath taking views

don t waste your money on this trash. 400myr for overpriced convenience store food rides that are either under construction closed or future rides. we had an issue at the beginning with purchasing tickets as well and honestly that 30 minute hassle just set the mood for the day. all the staff seem like they hate their jobs and their life no sense of joy or customer service. i wish i could get a refund for a glorified 3 hour walk. staff food rides and atmosphere were all a let down. stick inside and get to 120myr ride pass for the other park and thank me later. their maps also need updated all smoking areas are closed but still listed. you will have to exit the park and come back in.
genting skyworlds is fun but the food is quite expensive. however it s understandable as it s a tourist attraction.

amazing theme parks for great family holidays. so much fun rides food fond memories to enjoy. off peak accomodation rates and all day unlimited rides make it even a better deal. enjoy it while you can.

i love all the other rides but my favorite ride independence day has beeb under maintainence twice during the two times i ve lined up. mind you i ve been lining up for two hours for this ride and both times it has been under maintainence when i am already so close to the entrance. fix your ride before letting people go this is not worth the price.

had so much fun especially at ice age area. every game all age can play not too extreme. all game we try only samba gliders we haven t try cause that time they are under maintenance. but will try again next time. and plss buy tickets use klook apps got promo voucher btw.

the place is far so i recommend buying bus tickets back to kuala lumpur in advance. we were done exploring the place at 3pm as not all the rides were available and some were under maintenance. it s not crowded during weekdays but the cable car tickets sometimes do not work.

genting skyworlds at resorts world genting is a thrilling escape into a world of adventure and entertainment. situated 6 000 feet above sea level the breathtaking location adds an extra layer of excitement to the 26 acre amusement park. the nine uniquely themed worlds promise a diverse range of experiences from the majestic eagle mountain to the vibrant central park and the futuristic robots rivet town. the park inaugurated in 2022 boasts an impressive lineup of 26 rides and attractions ensuring there s something for everyone. the vq reservations system is a thoughtful addition allowing visitors to plan their day with timed entries for rides attractions and shows. a helpful tip for future visitors is to dress comfortably and come prepared for the altitude with a jacket or cardigan. it s also worth noting that costumes and full faced masks are not permitted ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for all. overall genting skyworlds is a must visit destination for thrill seekers and families alike offering a memorable blend of adventure and stunning views high above the malaysian landscape.

the theme park offers around 18 attractions in total however 6 of them were closed during our visit. additionally the staff are very strict with the height requirements even being less than 2 cm below the limit means entry is not allowed. because of this and the closures my children were only able to enjoy about 6 attractions in total. whether we would visit again depends on future promotions. there are similar parks in kl and selangor such as genting which might offer more variety. that said one notable advantage of this park is the pleasant cool weather which makes the overall experience more comfortable despite the limitations.

this is a nice break from urban kl and you ll love the outdoors park. that said avoid fridays and weekends the queues for the rides alone will test your patience 45m on one 60m on another varies on the less popular ones . we went when there was a beautiful foggy setting in december. the occasional shower can quickly drench one but ponchos disposable and reusable are easily available for 15 60rm. if you want to enjoy all the sights and sounds at genting highlands though book a hotel here and stay at least a night.

bought the vip ticket as a first timer to the park and we re matched with our guide heriani. she s lovely kind and took care of us entirely. she exudes empathy and is always checking in pre and post rides before moving forward to the next activity. overall we felt very comfortable and safe especially being a foreigner. trust on my word that if you re tagged with her you re in very good hands.

genting skyworlds theme park genting skyworlds theme park is an 11 hectare 26 acre themed amusement park at resorts world genting genting highlands malaysia. initially the park was to debut as 20th century fox world malaysia until the walt disney company s acquisition of 21st century fox the park was then renamed genting skyworlds upon reaching a settlement between 20th century fox and the walt disney company. as a result of the settlement some of the themed sections and attractions featuring 20th century studios and blue sky studios ip intellectual property were altered while some were successfully retained through licensing agreements with disney other attractions still in development at the time were reconfigured into different new or original concepts. genting skyworlds features over 20 different rides and attractions of varying thrill and intensity levels themed around a selection of popular entertainment and film franchises notably epic 2013 robots 2005 rio 2011 ice age 2002 night at the museum planet of the apes and independence day.

we went during soft opening. highly recommend to buy the tickets at least 1 day in advance online on their website or through some online seller like klook as it s much cheaper. you need also download the app if the park to be able to book some rides. if you cannot register through your mobile number you need to register with your email much easier and faster ask someone for assistance and ask how many virtual queue you can book to do not waste them for some short rides as we did the park itself is really nice a lot of options for young and for older visitors as well. the 3d attractions are amazing! really good quality ! wear something more heavy as it s a bit cold the park is in mountains

ms tesha was fabulous. she is caring and super friendly. i highly recommend to purchase vip tickets. seamless experience and service. just abit sad 1 2 rides we re having technical issues. other than that me and family were satisfied!

visiting genting highlands outdoor theme park was nothing short of amazing. from start until end. the games and attractions were so much fun and the live performances added a fantastic vibe to the whole experience. when the samba and rio songs started playing i couldn t help but dance along it felt like i was part of a carnival! booking through klook was super convenient and i highly recommend installing the skyworlds app before your visit. it saved us a ton of time by helping us plan better and avoid long queues. overall it was an epic day full of joy thrills and laughter. genting skyworlds is a must visit if you re looking for adventure and unforgettable memories.

had an amazing vip experience at genting skyworlds theme park thanks to ash! ash was extremely friendly professional and attentive throughout the whole experience. he made sure everything was well organised smooth and stress free allowing us to fully enjoy the rides without worrying about queues or timing. his knowledge of the park and thoughtful service really elevated our visit and made it feel truly special. highly recommend the vip experience and a big thank you to ash for making our day unforgettable!

extremely disappointed with the vq system at genting skyworlds. the system is poorly designed and highly confusing. i booked a virtual queue through the app but the booking did not appear properly. when i approached the staff for assistance i was told to use the machine instead only to find that the machine showed the quota was already full. what is even more unacceptable is that the machine did not display any information indicating that the ride was for children only despite us already booking 5 slots. we only found out later that adults were not allowed making the entire booking a complete waste of time. the time slots are inconsistent and do not match between the app and the machines making it impossible to plan the visit efficiently. this resulted in unnecessary frustration and a very poor overall experience. overall this was the worst theme park experience i have ever had a complete waste of time and money. for a theme park of this standard the virtual queue system should be far more reliable transparent and user friendly. this visit was deeply disappointing. just wait in a normal queue. vq system is not user friendly at all! the app too for just simple tasks like viewing the map also causes the app to crash.

visited on a monday just before 12nn. there were not a lot of people yet but theres already a queue on most rides. longest time ive waited is around 30mins for the ice age thin ice one and it wasnt even that worth it for an adult most extreme rides you need to queue on the app itself and need to leave your belongings somewhere hence i wasnt able to ride bc i need to pay additional for a locker since im solo and have no one to leave my belongings lol but i did around 5 minor rides and it was still fun. the place is not mind blowing huge though you can roam around in like 10 minutes and see everything. the night of the museum one is closed bc of the fire. some extreme rides are also closed for maintenance or for some other reason. plenty of food stalls around. cashless too so make sure to top up on your cards. advice to always book tickets online and ahead of time for easier entry.

beautifully located amusement park. if you re looking for crazy fast thrilling rides this is not quite the place. nevertheless this place has good rides though definitely a place to visit if you have not been before. please do the research on virtual queues and how they work and download their app before itself. the best rides according to me 1 acorn adventure 2 terraform tower challenge 3 samba gliders

no wagon for this park. don t bring it or you are requested to keep on outside the theme park locker area. rm 55 85 for a day rent base on your wagon size. then baby trolley is able to rent inside. everything with money

very very very fun and amazing. highly recommended. for the better experiance get vip and it is more that worth it.!!!!!!! our tour guide yusri was amazing he was so kind and made the experience even better! yusri if you are reading this thank you so much we had an amazing time!

genting skyworlds theme park is an incredible destination nestled in the cool highlands of malaysia offering a perfect mix of adventure entertainment and stunning scenery. the park features a variety of thrilling rides from heart pounding roller coasters like mad ramp peak to family friendly attractions such as epic voyage to moonhaven. each themed zone including andromeda base eagle mountain and ice age is beautifully designed to transport visitors into a world of excitement and fantasy. beyond the rides the park offers great dining options with themed restaurants serving both local and international cuisine. the atmosphere is vibrant and every corner is a perfect spot for capturing instagram worthy moments. the staff is friendly and the park is well maintained ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience for visitors of all ages. arriving early helps avoid long queues and since the highland weather can be unpredictable bringing a light jacket is a good idea. whether you re a thrill seeker or just looking for a fun day out with family and friends genting skyworlds theme park is a must visit destination that guarantees an unforgettable experience.

we had a great experience...it was fun... timings are from 10 am to 6 pm... we should have reached earlier to enjoy it more... we went on friday and there were queues in every ride so it is suggested that the best days are monday to thursday in order to save time from long waits...rides which we really enjoyed were samba gliders at rio night at the museum a 3d ride at central park invasion of the planet of apes at liberty lane entertainments were rio centre stage sid s playhouse ice age and many more... enjoy cable car while going back...

looks nice but the majority of the rides don t work. the ones that are operational have lines of two hours. three fast passes per per person but none available. add to the fact that it s just not that big and your kids are in for a big letdown. this review is just for the theme park. there are other things to do up here. bring a light jacket.

why is the water boat attraction always closed? i went here 3 weeks in a row and all of the days had really good weather but still hasn t opened. please fix this attraction s problem or issue. this is one of the rides a lot of us is looking forward too.

i was disappointed to find that not all the rides were open some were still under construction and others were closed for maintenance. considering we weren t able to experience everything i feel the ticket price should ve been adjusted to reflect that. it didn t seem fair to pay full price for a limited experience. on top of that the wait times were really long and it seemed like there was no cap on how many visitors were allowed in that day. however what really left a bad impression were a couple of staff members particularly at the alpha fighter pilots ride. we were there on the 8th of december around 12 50 pm. when we arrived the woman at the entrance asked us for our reservation queue and when we showed it she snapped at us and said reservation! again turns out she actually just wanted to see our qr code. staff should get their terminology right before even dare to get mad at us. reservations and qr are two different things. then when we got to the ride a young male worker told me to store my phone in a locker. i politely asked if i could keep it with me since it was my first visit and instead of giving a simple explanation he snapped kalau phone jatuh sapa nak bertanggungjawab?! his tone was rude and unnecessary. because of these negative experiences with staff i m not coming back again. i hope you take this feedback seriously and work on improving the overall guest experience both in terms of attractions and staff behaviour.

shoutout to our vip tour guide miss hernie .! couldn t have asked for a better experience. hernie was very friendly and pleasant. she always wore a welcoming smile on her face. she was very efficient in showing us around the place and helping us access the vip facility that we took. she looked after us very well. the whole vip pass felt totally worth it.

friendly staff at the entrance but at samba gliders the two staff putri and amirah were rude spoke harshly and served with a sour face. their attitude even felt discriminatory. totally ruined the mood.

ash frm vip experience he is so professionalism in his work fluent in speaking english and amazing young man. his energetic same level as my chns. my family really love his friendliness and cheerfulness. he took care of my family frm the start till the end so well. we will return to skyworld theme park and definitely for ash service. thank q for having us ash!

it was a lovely experience in the genting skyworlds theme park as they are suitable for all ages . the fact that there are many exciting rides is what this theme park made it enjoyable. i would say about the best rides in that theme park like independence day the world of apes and the rollercoasters. eventhough there is a huge waiting time it was worth of waiting. lastly reserving the rides through the app will make the line easier to go through.

bought the ticket during dec 2025 promotion around rm65. please install the apps skyworlds and use the 3 limited virtual queue to help you bypass long normal queue. recommended rides for adult use virtual q ice age acorn adventure alpha fighter pilot terraform tower rivert town roller independence day defiance

skyworlds theme park at genting highlands is a wonderful destination for families. the park offers a wide range of attractions that cater to all ages from young children to adults making it a perfect outing spot for everyone. the rides aren t overly intense which is fantastic for children and those who prefer a more relaxed experience. my kids absolutely loved the colourful themes and family friendly rides. the ticket prices are quite reasonable especially considering the quality of the attractions and the lovely atmosphere. overall skyworlds is an ideal spot for families looking for a fun and memorable day out.

i don t exactly get the hype. yes the cable car ride is nice and getting to the mall above is nice. but the theme park is very overrated. it s got about 10 rides only and you have to put your stuff in a locker and pay for the locker only for the locker to be far from the other rides which means you have to pay again and again for more lockers does not make sense. they should do it in a way that you can use all lockers across. we kept having to go back and forth to get our phones which you need to book some rides . the theme park itself could do with much more. many places are quiet and just dead. they could add a lot more life to it to be honest. apart from being in the clouds i didn t see much excitement to it. the few immersive experiences weren t bad though. it s very expensive for what you get. you also have to download the stupid app to get around and book things.. who the hell wants to do that in a theme park?? also we went out to get a bus taxi at around 7pm bear in mind it all closes at 11 and the buses were fully booked and so were the taxis .. how does that happen?? also there is literally no signs to where rides are. you have to run around like a monkey trying to figure things out overall it s okay. not highly exciting and could do with much more improvement

went here recently 18 07 2025 friday and wow what a ride literally . it was a day packed with fun rides stunning views and a beautiful blend of chaos and laughter. it was the kind of day that left your legs sore and your throat hoarse from all the screaming. in short? worth it. let s talk highlights because not all rides are created equal. terraform tower challenge this ride woke up parts of my soul i didn t know existed. it s a drop tower yes but it s not just a go up and fall kind of deal. it s a spiritual experience. rasa macam my soul tertinggal dekat atas ahahhaha... i screamed laughed panicked and then wanted to do it again. so i did this twice! 1000 10. alpha fighter pilots hands down my favourite ride. it went full 360 and it was insanely funnnn! acorn adventure most unexpected plot twist. i went in thinking ah a cute chill ride for kids! next thing i knew we were flying around. i screamed. i laughed. i felt betrayed. naturally i rode it again to heal the emotional wound. so yeah don t underestimate this. other honorable mention independence day defiance sci fi fans you re gonna love this. it s like being tossed around in space. 10 10 would repeat. long waiting time eventho i use vq. tips wear comfortable shoes. put your bag in the locker use the vq reservation system. saves you from standing around wasting time and energy. i managed to try almost all attractions 14 18 . 2 were closed on that day.

saya pernah pergi uss universal studios singapore dan bila dibandingkan antara uss dan genting skyword i more prefer genting skyworld because of this reason 1. apps skyworlds really helpful. from detail timing waiting time reservations navigation and the most useful is the myphoto feature that we can get pictures straight away in our phone. this app is better than uss app hahaha. 2. attraction all the attractions really wonderful up to date the area were clean and tidy. 3. customer service kami terserempak dengan manager aiman if iam not mistaken he was a very good and nice person. he show us the way to the attractions and even explain about the attractions that they have in genting.the explanation was really good and interesting. he even suggested us the top ride that they have there. he even told us about the sale and guess what? we bought 6 pillow for only rm20 each because of the sale hahahah 4. weather really calm and not hot which is a good weather to enjoy the attractions. and no so cold. one layer of shirt is just fine to improve photo frame some of it is a bit crowded especially if we take a group photo some part might cropped because of the frame. example safari frame

this is the worst park i ve ever been to. lots of people. the ride workers don t explain anything. on the boot camp training they asked me to put my bag in a locker. and they didn t let me in with my 5 year old because i had of my phone any information about phones i didn t see . although they approved a girl with a backpack under her jacket and a phone. on the slide where there is water epic voyage the worker doesn t say anything about raincoats. only in the queue do you understand that you need them. many locations are not working or closed. not worth your money and time! i read somewhere that this is the best park in southeast asia. oh no! dream land in bangkok and universal in singapore are much better!

terrible experience. don t go during peak periods. queues were way too long. only managed to get on 2 rides because the queues were so long. this was exacerbated by the fact that many rides were inexplicably closed. it might ve been due to the heavy fog but i doubt that. virtual queue system is useless. 3 slots total and once you get onto the ride you can t use the slot anymore. in other words you can only book 3 rides with the vq system. on top of that some rides only use virtual queues with no regular queues. they do not indicate if the ride only uses virtual queues. this means that when you get there at your reserved time you don t skip to the front of the queue. you have to queue again at the ride. and if it s overbooked you might have to wait for over an hour to get in. be prepared for your money to be squeezed. on top of the expensive food and 15rm raincoat skyworlds expects you to pay 22rm just to have the privilege to store your belongings in a small locker before you get on a ride that requires you to remove your belongings from your persons. rainy day guarantee appears generous until you realise that instead of a ticket refund you get a complimentary return ticket to be used within 12 months. meaning you get to spend exorbitant amounts of money on a hot dog again!! yay!! tips if you still want to go 1. download the skyworlds app before your trip and reserve your rides early. 2. buy and bring your own raincoat. skyworlds sells 1 for 15rm 3. bring your own food and snacks to save money. 4. avoid holiday season. if going anyway show up early when the park opens to avoid the queues. 5. pray they don t close down rides for no reason.

i had an amazing experience at genting skyworlds! the park is clean well organized and full of exciting attractions. i d like to give special thanks to vip tourist staff priya her service was outstanding! she was very friendly professional and attentive which made my visit even more enjoyable. i m really satisfied with her excellent service. highly recommend the vip experience it s totally worth it!
exceptional enthusiasm. zipped through rides in the vip experience. big shoutout to raiz for touring us around!
it was great place but it s just much people on the some ride it s too 2h just getting fun ride but it s worth it i recommend it

you want to come to the theme park for fun amusement but this park is far from it. kids had to wait 1 2 hrs in the queues before it s your turn. and how many rides you can take it a day? maybe 4 if you are lucky and have got nerves to wait. the photo is just one of the rides but every ride was same. kids were bored to death. they sell more tickets than they can accomodate. worst ever theme park experience not coming here again and won t recommend. paid a lot of money they charge international tourists more to get in i m sorry my kids didn t like coming here.

this may be a small theme park but it s the best theme park in malaysia. compared to legoland the facilities are well maintained operational and clean! the themes are on point and the rides are really fun! we went on a weekday and there was hardly any wait times for the rides. we managed to do the ice age roller coaster 4 times! we managed to do the samba gliders 3 times too with hardly any wait times. we didn t need to use the vr queue except for the boot camp which was mandatory. everyone was also amazed with the independence day ride which was so realistic! other then the rides the ability to go in and out of the park during the day is awesome. it s ashame two of their biggest rides are not operational due to the company genting hired to build the whole theme park going bust. hope those 2 rides are operational soon in the future. overall a very fun day out for the family.

a great place to be to escape the heat and enjoy the cold environment. reasonable size theme park with some good rides. we were lucky that there were not many people and managed to repeat some rides. the best ride would be the iceage roller coaster. food in the theme park is so so and expensive. however i would say the theme park was well managed and well maintained.
nice place to have a family retreat...great weather..
spend 3 days and 2 nights here. play at skyworld and skytropolis it s definitely worth it. suitable for bringing children who are 135cm tall and above as there are many rides they can try.

it s an exceptional theme park with lots of great rides. the theme park is located on a hill top due to which you can experience very pleasant weather. sometimes it gets very foggy and you feel like you are in the clouds. once inside you will not know how time flies. there could be a very long queue for getting into any ride because it s a very touristy place. you can download the genting skyworlds app to access the virtual queue and to locate the rides inside the theme park. you will get free water from the drinking water taps. food courts are also available inside where you can have good food. must visit if you are visiting malaysia.
our ambassador s name is hairi he is very helpful respectful and knowledgeable on the theme parks games and etc. one of the best experiences i evr encountered! could not wait to comeback here again!
if you been to singapore universal then this place will seem dull. rooms sixer category is awesome. location is bad for food you will need to walk atleast 1 km to eat.

glad it s not malaysia school holiday as the waiting time to rides is rather manageable. we are able to enjoy most of the rides but unfortunately it was drizzling. overall experience was good as the staff here is very helpful and friendly.
amisha was very sweet and a superb guide! hassle free vip experience with her!

this theme park felt a bit like a mini version of universal studios singapore some rides being of good quality but short but the service facilities and program was top notch as expected from a brand name like resorts world. exceptional riders included the ice age thin ice and independence day defiance. the shows were also quite entertaining for kids. the crowd levels are lower than the mall side of resorts world genting. while it was reasonably crowded with ride queues up to 40 mins the virtual queue system helped to save time doing other things. it was also not really congested with sufficient breathing room. the cool weather was also a plus but the thinner air and being closer to the sun could induce fatigue suitable preparations advised.

this is an awesome theme park with plenty to do the rides are great and will be even better when they get the other two coasters going but being up in the hills in the fog was a really cool experience

visiting genting resort theme parks was an exhilarating experience! the variety of attractions catered to all ages from thrilling roller coasters to family friendly rides. the attention to detail in the themed areas created an immersive atmosphere and the breathtaking views from the outdoor attractions added an extra dimension of excitement. it s a must visit destination for anyone seeking an unforgettable day of fun and adventure. the theme parks were crowded with people which at times affected the overall experience. long lines and crowded walkways made it challenging to fully enjoy all the attractions. despite this the diverse range of activities and entertainment options still made it a worthwhile visit for those willing to navigate the crowds. i have uploaded few videos unfortunately it s raining during the time. so to get full enjoyment in the outdoor theme really affected by the weather. option in case of bad weather indoor theme park also as good as outdoor theme park too.

nice place to have a day out but beware the kids tickets is a scam. above 110cm means pay adult price but so many rides they cant take they check height strictly at entrance maybe more strict on foreigners i dunno know? kids grow tall easily with good nutrition food so prob means most kids above 5 yrs need to pay adult price

had an amazing time here with our friends totally worth the visit. we reached the theme park directly via cab but on return we took the cable cart to come down. try booking a day prior to get a good discounted price.

ash from the vip experience was superb. he knows multiple language. he is friendly helpful flexible and very accommodating. i like how he went extra mile to ensure our vip experience is good! my kid likes him so much. will definitely visit again! thank you ash!

located in genting highlands closed on tuesdays. tickets about 210rm for tourists plus cable car. good place to spend a day with family. rides are ok but no where close to universal studios or disney land! food is expensive inside.
need to be early so you can enjoy every games. if not... the q is very long.

this place really gives you the universal studio feel as each ride theme is nicely designed to suit it. there are a few thrill rides and plenty of family rides to be given to you to try it out. for the price of 128rm it is definitely worth it but for the price of 189rm not so. but you guys should try at least once when the price and weather are right. 1 you can buy the tickets online using the genting app for 128rm. however you have to buy in advance. if there is any bad weather you may proceed to the theme park counter and ask for a refund. however there may be a chance they would not refund you. this is according to the counter i asked before purchasing the ticket for the day itself. buying a ticket on the day itself will cost 189rm. 2 those of you that could not stand cold weather please bring some jacket or long pants would be preferred. 3 if you have those disposals raincoat you can bring it just in case it rains. weather may lead to some rides closure as well so check the weather forecast beforehand 4 lockers are provided inside with a cost of 20rm 4 hr so do not worry about the bags when you want to take the rides. 5 download the skyworld app. you can link your tickets to your account and you can create a group as well using the app. so that you can book your ride time slot as a group similar to fast pass and it s free. the app provides you a map and your current location with the rides waiting time as well so it s very convenient.

the theme park was amazing the majority of attractions were working and even when some of them closed temporarily i just returned back 30 minutes after and found it open again and that was a good point also the food was good and there is options for all tastes and all types and the prices are correct i loved more the 3d attractions i highly recommend them don t miss them out also download the app and get 3 virtual queues to skip the line for me you don t need to pay for skip line tickets since the wait is only between 5 and 10 minutes but that was a monday not weekends. i liked my experience here more than disneyland paris even with less number of attractions but they are better in terms of the theme and quality.

this is an overall great theme park with top tier theming. the rides are fun the food is affordable and the park itself seems well maintained. with that being said there are 2 e tickets ride that never opened due to the company contracted to built them going bankrupt. even though this is out of skyworlds control it s been 3 years and a decision needs to be made. these 2 almost done rides needs to be completed or demolished.

a fun experience indeed. but those with acrophobia aren t recommended to go here tips 1. buy bus and cable car ticket from the redbus app. rm20 only 2. buy tickets from trip.com cheaper 3. go during weekdays. 4. install skyworld apps before going.
as usual long lines during public holiday. kinda chilly i love the view when riding the ice age acorn adventure. waiting time 10 70min rides

smallish theme park that has rides availability highly dependant on the weather. we visited on a gloomy day with low visibility but no showers. some rides were closed as a result. despite this i think it is money well spent for a visit. rides are suitable for various age groups and rated between 1 to 3 1 is the highest intensity . off peak would take around half a day to complete the park with limited to no queues. special shout out to priya who gave us clear and very helpful guidance when we were entering the park.
great experiences for the young at heart. had some exhilarating rides like acorns. came on a rainy day but got to enjoy most of the attractions.

half the attractions were closed due to technical issues the other half required using an app that didn t work. so the remaining rides had an hour and a half wait. overall a very disappointing experience. highly recommend staying away.

terrible terrible terrible maintenance. we arrived at 10 a.m. expecting most rides to be operational especially since genting skyworlds theme park has been operating for four years. we visited on january 3rd a weekend and i fully understand that the park may be crowded and packed. however as a major tourism destination there should not be repeated technical issues that result in guests wasting up to two hours waiting. the situation at terrafoam challenge tower was especially disappointing seeing it shut down due to technical difficulties after such a long wait was frustrating and unacceptable. we paid an exceptional price yet most of our time was spent dealing with delays and standing in queues rather than enjoying the rides. the app experience is equally horrendous. navigation is confusing and unreliable and limiting ride bookings to only three times is extremely unreasonable. genting you can do much better than this. this experience was deeply disappointing pure sadness.

top tourist attraction in malaysia after reaching genting highlands we need to buy a ticket to enter this theme park. you will be able to see the full view of this theme park on your trip with awana skyway. we booked our tickets in prior through klook app to avoid big queues. many attractions inside this theme park. my recommendations would be 1. photoshoot at the entrance 2. night at the museum 3. ice age 4. planet of the apes 5. independence day must visit many rides and lot of fun
very cool place with sooo much to play around. had sooo much fun. and feels real

i went on 14th february 2022 during the soft opening phase. 16 places were already open. must buy the ticket from the genting website. take the earliest slot. you must download the skyworlds genting app to virtually reserve vq the games and stops. if you vq you get priority to play. use the app to plan your journey. use the app to enter the theme park. rm152 for adults promo price rm128 for the children promo . plan your journey on your app! i m not joking. jangan walk in je unless you are lucky no one is there. attire shoes sports shoes a must avoid caps or jewelery wear long sleeves it can be cold locker available for rm5 per hour. where to park skyavenue get to the ground floor and follow the skyworlds theme park signage or the old open space genting parking opposite genting grand hotel where there s tealive next enter the old genting building opposite that parking and walk straight and take the escalator to the skyavenue. foods there are plenty of foods and common drinks sausages tacos harry ramsden fish and chips corns soups ice creams waffles pizzas and noodles to be open . food price rm15 rm25 for a good full stomach. no cash. everything is paid by card or cashless payment. operation 11.00 a.m. 6.00 p.m. thrilling games if you are looking for a thrill go for these andromeda base boleh sakit jantung vertical scare samba gliders like a roller coaster but you will be hung in a seat and fly from the top esd global defender pusing pusing teruk high as well alpha fighter 360 fast spin slightly high defiance 3d screen but the seat moves a bit and it will lift you up. you will feel like you are sucked into the screen. you might feel scared. prepare to vomit. the rollercoaster isn t open yet but it will be soon. wet games epic hummingbird spin but not fast and no rotation not too scary epic voyage boat journey in the water but there will be 2x thrilling moment. imagine yourself falling from a high river. behold! beware. you can get wet so play these at the end of all your games. game for the fit people bootcamp this is like jump street 21. wall climbing merentas halangan obstacles flying fox. if you re used to it it will be easy. game duration most games are only about less than 3 minutes so you won t feel scared for too long exception ice age live show probably about 15 minutes bootcamp as long as you want it doesn t really have a specific duration. the bad parts the sudden technical check up on the games. this made me wait for 15 minutes. most games are short spanned so your enjoyment will be short. some people may find this area small. i hope there will be more games. the skyworlds app may suddenly cancel your vq reservation! this is gonna make you mad if you have to queue with the walk ins. i hope genting improves its app. worth the price i appreciate the design and the beauty of the set and the animation. see it for yourself. everything is neat and designed to suit each theme. instagrammable. rio is the nicest city ever. the american cowboy city is the second amazing theme. the museum is superb too! go to the epic and you will love the green. i love everything about the decoration. it s not easy to make all this happening. thank you to the team who has gone through all the preparation. come to theme park on weekdays because there will be fewer people. the games may go through some technical issue or sanitisation before they resume as usual. just listen to the instructions. have fun!

the theme park was amazing with plenty of exciting rides that we thoroughly enjoyed! unfortunately a few rides were temporarily closed during our visit but it didn t take away from the overall fun experience.
fun day at the skyworlds theme park! overall after going to more thrilling rides in lotte world uss usj rides here are milder. love the acron adventure and terraform free fall the most!
