brought unlimited tickets wasted a good 60 sgd. terrible crowd control rides were spoiled. don t even bother coming. they should limit the pax to control crowd but ofc they won t since they are money hungry.
we had such an amazing experience with the vip package. our host nurin went above and beyond to take care of my family. the best way to experience skyworld. thank you so much!

if you re looking to disappoint yourself over and over again then this theme park is for you. there were no clear directions to the theme park from the get go. queues to rides were at least 2 hours long. their virtual queue system is practically useless because you will still need to wait 40 minutes to get on the ride at your designated time of visit. staff were rude and impatient with us. we ve spent the whole day waiting just to get on two rides. spend your precious time elsewhere. would not recommend to anyone and would give zero stars if i could.

book you tickets online a day in advance. you will save some money. the place is awesome. great rides shows restaurants. it s one price for entry and the rides then are free. and it is expensive. but the good rides have really long wait times. the virtual queue on the app is handy but is for limited options so u need be careful what you choose. so you hardly cover half of the things for the price you pay. they could make it choice based to help manage the price benefit. kids will love the place. the ice age shows and rides are great. and the staff experience is mixed. some are very nice. some openly rude. the weather during our visit was mind blowing though. all in all was worth the visit for sure.
great experience. i recommend booking the games through the app to avoid long waiting times. i loved independence day game and ice age ride

the theme park has some park under renovation and rides are ok which is not extremely thrill so it is quite suitable for all ages. however at one point we could not use the priority queue system because the system is down. the staff chase us out even when i show them we have 3 queue to reserve but their system is down but they don t listen. i went to the customer service and ask what can we do i was told we can just show them our ticket that include the priority queue and so i went again but was chase off. i then have to go back to the customer service and they reluctantly bring us personally to the priority queue. still its a way to kill half a day with the kids and i especially like the independence day ride.

i am extremely disappointed with my recent visit. despite arriving at 12 noon we waited almost 3 hours for our first ride due to repeated technical issues. for visitors paying almost rm1 000 this level of service is unacceptable. the park s early closing time of 6 pm further limited our experience. i believe this visit did not deliver the value promised and i would appreciate a review of this matter including the possibility of a refund.

genting skyworlds is an outdoor theme park located in resorts world genting pahang malaysia perched about 6 000 ft above sea level . here s what you should know highlights themed zones 9 uniquely themed worlds spread across 26 acres featuring 26 rides and attractions from exciting rollercoasters to family friendly experiences . worlds include studio plaza the grand art deco entry hub. eagle mountain adrenaline rush awaited e.g. mad ramp peak coming soon . central park includes interactive dark rides like night at the museum and the dome screen independence day defiance. liberty lane home to the immersive planet of the apes 3d ride. andromeda base epic rio robots rivet town ice age each offers their own themed attractions from galactic challenges to frozen era fun . opening tickets soft opened on 8 february 2022 after years of delay and a rebrand from 20th century fox world . operating hours 10 am 6 pm daily closed on tuesdays except school public holidays . ticket pricing online deals malaysians approx. rm151 adult during promo usd 35 . non malaysians around usd 50 joint tickets with skytropolis available for rm189 usd 42 .

do better lol. the boot camp training ruined the entire experience for my family. the staff members at the boot camp training really need to reflect on their attitude and work on their tone especially the female staff members. maintaining professionalism and basic respect despite differences is crucial especially in the service industry and if they are unable to uphold that standard then they should really reconsider this job. the first mistake they made when we first entered was that they didn t even bother explaining the rules and regulations of this activity. hence we did not know that phones were not allowed for this activity and one of the female staff proceeded to shout at my mum scolding her for using her phone. i believe that there s no need to scream and shout when they can just inform us politely. i understand that it was quite a high distance so naturally they would need to raise their voice for us to be able to hear but their tone and attitude was bad and you could tell. it was obvious. following that we provided feedback to one of the other female staff and instead of acknowledging the feedback given her face turned sour and gave subtle attitude. not sure whether they were having a bad day or what but still that does not give them the right to take it out on customers. please do not let your emotions and opinions affect your professionalism. a job is a job. seriously please educate your staff.

the theme park was surprisingly fun! there were many rides of various thrill levels though i d say most are suitable for adults wouldn t say it s very kids friendly as i find some actually quite thrilling . the scariest was probably the space defender thingy where you spin upside down and the most fun one was the ice log one. not much queue for the rides max 30 mins for one ride and the virtual queue system actually helps. would definitely come back again.
super beautiful place. want to go there 1000 time more and more......

the most boring theme park i ve ever been to. the thrilling rides are very mid. there aren t many rides and some require a fast pass to get in. in addition you can not bring a tote bag or anything with you you have to pay for lockers. what a ripoff

i experienced the vip outdoor theme park tour on two occasions and both visits were exceptional. the tour guides were highly professional helpful and respectful which greatly enhanced the overall experience. in particular firdaus and aiman hadi demonstrated excellent hospitality and enthusiasm making the tours both enjoyable and memorable. they are truly outstanding individuals.

visited at 11 am on non peak and bought my tickets online sgd 30 ish. be sure to download skyworld apps for convenience of gps and waiting time. it was a good experience as there s no wait for the rides. if you love cool and ice age why not. the live shows not so entertaining.

genting highlands theme park a must visit destination genting highlands theme park is a thrilling getaway located just an hour s drive from kuala lumpur. nestled high in the mountains it offers a refreshing escape from the city heat with its cool climate and breathtaking views. the theme park part of resorts world genting is a perfect blend of adventure entertainment and fun making it an ideal destination for families couples and thrill seekers alike. the highlight of the park is skytropolis indoor theme park featuring over 20 exciting rides for visitors of all ages. from adrenaline pumping roller coasters to gentle carousels there s something for everyone. the newly added genting skyworlds outdoor theme park has taken the experience to the next level with its world class attractions and themed zones inspired by popular movies. beyond the rides genting highlands offers unique experiences like the awana skyway a cable car ride providing stunning panoramic views of the surrounding rainforest. visitors can also explore the genting premium outlets dine at a variety of restaurants or try their luck at malaysia s only legal casino. whether you re looking for adventure or a relaxing mountain retreat genting highlands theme park has it all. it s more than just a theme park it s a complete entertainment hub!

visited genting skyworlds on 10th october with family and friends. overall the rides were fun and the scenery was really nice the whole park is well designed and great for photos. however i was quite disappointed with the staff attitude. most of them didn t smile and looked rather unfriendly especially before the rides some even sounded a bit fierce. it made the experience feel less welcoming. it also rained during our visit and a few rides were closed which was a bit of a letdown. there aren t many rides suitable for small kids so families with young children might find the options limited. still it s a beautiful park and worth visiting once for the experience just hope the staff can be more cheerful and a few more rides open for the little ones next time.

newest outdoor theme park at genting highlands very clean and fun! entered around 1130am and not very crowded despite festive season. download apps to book time slot will save lots of time for queue. 4d vr experience was top notch as well as exciting rides of roller coster etc. few eateries available. really nice to play in breezy cold environment!

love the theme park as it always feels like exiting real world and entering a fantasy world.. manage to get on 8 rides . i also like the fact that we can exit theme park to come back again and the staff there were pretty friendly and helpful

because i stay in the genting skyworld hotel i have a privilages to enter the skyworld from the entrance right in front of the hotel. i got 30 discount from traveloka apps so it is recommended to purchase online whether from genting official website or other travel apps. it will also skip the queue to purchase onsite. this theme park was not that big and many attractions were on maintenance. even during the time we entered the park some of the attractions suddenly closed for maintenance. many attractions intended for child but several attractions for adult thrill enough to ride. i like the boot camp training. i never saw an outbound game in the theme park and here was one. most of the game are not allow any belongings including phone. it is better to put your items in your hotel room or rent a locker 25 rm for a whole day. there is one prayer room near rio section.

very exciting rides beautiful landscape. cold windy super nice place to visit. but if raining very inconvenient. you get replacement ticket with the raining day guarantee. the verdict is very very very crowded on weekend and public holiday.
jz wanna tell you guys vq reservation can booking only 3 games

love this new outdoor theme park the facilities is good. i like the mobile app and virtual queue. it s like a fast lane allow you to play ride without waiting for the long queue. and the maps in the app is really convenient. even though the park looks small but it really has many rides. the independent day is my personal favorite! the boat ride is surprising good. all the building looks so good. it looks better when there is sun. food in the theme park is affordable genting price there is also a starbucks inside.

it s a vibrant youth oriented amusement park with popular cartoon and movie themes. the theme park is appropriate for kids teenagers and adults. it is pretty spacious although it is advisable to visit on weekends to avoid high wait times. it s a terrific spot for families because the cool weather and exhilarating rides make an excellent combo.

very inconvenient most thrilling rides are only available for reservations and if u don t reserve it ll be full . the app they told us to download also limits us to 3 reservations only which is unreasonable and loses the point of reserving. u will most likely spend 4 hours here dont waste ur time

it was a thursday and it s not school holiday and yet i only managed to take 3 rides for the whole afternoon. 2 with virtual queue you will have to start queueing if you arrive before the reservation time and you can only go in right on the dot and then queue for another 20 25min for both your rides. most of the virtual queues are fully booked in the afternoon. the app is also not user friendly route design is not clear. we have to move around asking the staff for directions. overall very lousy experience.

overall experience was great. the theme park was smaller than expected. heads up the weather is quite unpredictable with sudden rain showers but wasn t too crazy. you can get ponchos from any of their gift shops. sadly some rides my kids wanted to take weren t open and some rides do close randomly for technical checks but their app is great to book a time slot to skip the queue and check for queue time. it s still great to visit and enjoy with family.

i allocated one whole day to explore the genting highlands starting from enjoying the mountainous view through the cable car embarking on a cultural journey in the chin swee caves temple and lastly trying all the rides and attractions in this genting skyworlds theme park. i came here on a weekday the queue was not bad and i managed to try all the attractions. i purchased the standard day pass ticket for rm 189 and i think it was worth it. the reason i can t give 5 stars is because some attractions required a booking through their app but the app didn t even work and turned out there were a lot of people having the same problem i hope they fix this already. i ended up doing the booking at the self service machine next to an attraction called the night at the museum which was a bit of a hassle. apart from this issue all good

feels like this awesome place is too underrated. i love this themepark the place is clean and quite large but not too large so we can enjoy a day here without being too tired. the attractions are very fun especiallya acorn adventure. we visit at the weekdays on march and thankfully the weather was nice. bring rain coat just for in case. wear jackets all the time because it s cold there. i hope someday we can go back there again

we are accompanied by shakir.. very good experience and very friendly. really recommend for the guided tour for family.. he is very patient and happy to have him as our guided tour. all the rides are good and being vvip for all the queues. thanks alot.

visited a merchandise shop redwoods trading post at genting skyworlds theme park on 14 feb and received excellent service from one of the male staff members proactive attentive and understood exactly what i need without me having to explain much his great attitude and service i ended up making a purchase. well done!

not a great experience if you have been to places like tokyo disneyland but comparable to universal studios singapore. waiting time for the rides are not long and if you have their app you can just skip the long queue to a short one with their vq pass thing in the skyworlds theme park app. seems like quite a lot of rides are not available not sure what happened because it was renovated before covid so am a bit puzzled why the upkeep of the place is so bad. carnival games are quite expensive and not fun at all. i think they should do something about it like maybe some free tokens to get the hotel guests to play a few then get them hooked to play more. unlimited exit and entry per ticket for the day. a good experience for your first time. but i think they should open at 10am instead of 11am and maybe close at a later time like 8pm or even 9pm or you could pay for two days to the theme park to cover all the rides and go for the 2nd time for each ride.

went bcos of the promo price rm65 so worth it and lucky bcos most of the rides are available eventho the status was unavailable when i checked in the app morning. please2 download the skyworld app to make ur life easiear. use the virtual queue feature my waiting time was less than 12 minutes except for the defiance war. some people are not aware on this and keep blaming the staff why they allowed our line to get into the ride first.

went here on a saturday. generally i find most staff unfriendly and not approachable. they scare away if you talk to them in english. my family had queued for one ride for an hour only to be told that the samba gliders stopped working. such a waste of time. the app was also useless i had trouble booking so we approached a staff the staff just anyhow booked a slot without my permission. when i told him why he do that he told me to go to guest service counter. when at this counter the staff messed up with my wifi connection too. overall the theme park didn t feel like you were in uss or something. it was so so. wouldn t return here lol.

visited this place for the 2nd time after a year. i thought the rides will be more stable and more rides will be opened. i was so wrong it was even worse compared to my first visit. oh for the second time i visited during weekdays. it was great because it was less packed less people. but little did i know that less people means more rides will be closed! i was mind blown at the number of rides closed and my favourite waffle shop is closed too. 1 of the rides had technical issue which required the staff to escort us out by climbing few flight of stairs. feels like a special tour if you look at the bright side. another ride which involves 3d motion graphic wasn t working well where during the climax nothing was showing on the screen. my friends and i had to ride again to experience it. verdict don t visit this park until the full launch. rm170 for adults rm145 for kids. however if you just want to enjoy the architecture then you are welcome to visit. i personally think it s skyworlds is a beautiful theme park and hope they fix the rides technical issues soon.

we had an unforgettable experience at gentingskyworlds theme park which is filled with thrills excitement and imagination. we spent an exciting adventurous day in 26 acre wonderland at genting skyworlds theme park where nine captivating theme worlds await your discovery a delightful place for families and even for friends. the theme park has rides for young children as well as grownups.

we bought vip access for genting skyworlds theme park and we re lucky to have mr. rais as our tour guide! he s really making the trip around the rides enjoyable and very informative. thank you mr. rais!

as a visitor i found the theme park at genting highlands to be a lot of fun with a variety of exciting rides and attractions. the park is well maintained and the staff is friendly and helpful. i particularly enjoyed the roller coasters which provided a thrilling and exhilarating experience. there are also plenty of other rides and activities for people of all ages including a water park a haunted house and a 4d theater. the park can get quite busy especially on weekends and holidays but there are plenty of food and drink options available to keep visitors fueled up for all the fun. overall the theme park at genting highlands is a great destination for anyone looking for a day of excitement and entertainment.

one of the place to visit when in genting. this theme park is in walkable distance from all the known hotels in the area. we got the entry tickets through klook so our check in was pretty easy. downloaded the theme park related app for easier virtual queuing and accessing the photos we took at the photobooths with additional charges . couple of rides were closed for maintenance. so we went with all the available ones some queues were pretty long though. it started to rain at the end of the day and we got free tickets for next time within 6 months usable . they can improve on the app with respect to virtual queuing as it was not clear that only 1 2 rides offer these features. also food options inside the theme park is less so better to carry some if you don t intend to go out many times. experience wise it wasn t great but can give it a try once in a while. cheers!

very very fun ! definitely go during weekday! i heard people line up for 1 hour for 1 ride in weekend and school holiday. we went in random weekday so we barely had to line up for any ride. tips disclaimer without kids tips 1. if you plan to go early morning do bring sweater. it gets really really cold until 11 in the morning 2. please people just go with cable car gondola. no need to drive up yourself. the road are pretty harsh. its more comfortable with gondola. and if you re lucky theres no need to line up and get the gondola all to yourself. weekday luckk 3. we left all our stuff at the car at gondola car park so we only bring ic bank cards and phone. no need to bring any other valuable items leave it at home. maybe only applicable to those with friends and no kids . those with spectacles can wear contact lens. its more convenient because some rides require you to take it off. 4. download genting skyworld apps to book ride through vq reservations. and you can know your location and closest rides to you too. 5. i asked chatgpt for the sequence of rides to save time from walking back and forth. 6. you ll get wet at some rides. not wet just splash here and there. go to those rides first i think its the ice age roller coaster voyanhem and independence day that involve water. then you can ride gliders and other rides to dry yourself. 6. if you go at 10 am please please go to independence day first. so the actors will have energy to act very very well ! very veryy fun ride! definitely a must! ice age roller coasters is also a must! that is one long ride scary but worth it and the gliders! that is definitely a must! 7. btw rides usually require you to go with someone or else its gonna be little bit awkward with strangers. mostly they wont make you ride with strangers but if the line is long they will have to adjust it. i would recommend to go in group of 8 people kami berdua je i think you can can enjoy your best with 8 people. but maybe too much for some ride. but its fairly okay and fun to ride the rides together. 8. those who get sick easily just accept the fact that you will the cold weather the wet and dry situation will get you sick. but thats okay ! its still fun!

ticket is reasonably priced park is beautiful and clean however the park is highly dependant on the weather since it s high up in the mountains visited the park twice in year end and january always plagued with heavy clouds and rain which sorta spoilt much of the enjoyment. recommended to visit in summer.

didn t stay at the hotel so i can t really rate that. but the theme park was great. what made it even better was the nice cold breeze considering the humidity in kl. if you re visiting malaysia with kids genting highlands is a must. food is not really good though. and cash is very limited so your debit card goes along way. the queues can be long but that s expected. their outlet mall is also good clean and well designed for your babies momma

an amazing family getaway even it was raining almost half of the visit. we re more prepared this time. brought our own raincoats so that we still can walked through the rain. however there were still queues we need to pass to enter certain rides due to their popularity. the booking system in the app was helpful anyway. overall we enjoyed the day we spent here.
enjoyable theme park with cold weather and fresh air. everything is clean and good to use. the games are so very and can challenge your adrenalin. great value for money and the facilities are good.

while the rides were fun overall it was just okay. we went on 7th november and one of the rides we queued for was epic voyage to moonhaven. we were told that this indoor boat ride would get us wet so of course we bought raincoats from the trolley store just outside the entrance as suggested for rm15 each costing us a total of rm75. we queued for almost an hour only for the ride to face technical issues and close down due to the weather which was foggy for an indoor ride . from that alone we wasted rm75 and an hour . not to mention another ride where we were already strapped in and due to another technical issue we had to get off. omg the excitement anyway the staff were friendly and helpful and the place was clean. it s still worth a visit if the rides don t close down midway!

for me getting skyworld theme park is the best and the most worth place in kl. i reserve bus from kl sentral and it takes around 1 hr. the place is well managed and well maintained. staffs are friendly and helpful. the attractions are various and you can select which are suited you. the price of product in souvenir shop is reasonable. you can spend all day here with your family.

you can spend fun times with your family or friends or even by yourself! there are different food options but don t expect fancy and good quality but still you have to pay more. you can install the theme park app and do vq reserve so you can skip the long lines. some of the items are really worth it we loved the acorn adventure. samba gliders were good but short. invasion of the planet apes really is not worth it maybe just for children. independence day was also cool.

i ve been to many theme parks worldwide and have never experienced anything this bad. for 3hrs wait for one ride is unacceptable. technical problems wasted most of our time and the park closes at 6 pm. completely not worth the money. deeply disappointed and would not recommend. it s a waste of money and time!!!

the overall experience feels more like visiting a funfair rather than a theme park. too many attractions and rides with technical issues. 3 out of 5 rides we trying to play having technical issues. we were stuck in the waiting queue for almost 1 hour. really waste of time. one star rating is given for a rather unpleasant experience at genting skyworlds theme park. the majority of the fun rides and roller coasters such as samba glider epic voyage to moonhaven ice age expedition thin ice and acorn adventure were closed due to technical issues! i have paid like almost 60 sgd per ticket but in return providing visitors with a bad experience and lousy maintenance! the only good experience is the staffs at the theme park were friendly. the queue is not needed for the majority of the rides during weekdays.
great place for fun entertainment and adventures for a full family. from adults to kids there are rides for everyone. there are dance performances in between. nice place for eating as well.

much easier with the app. no need to queue for long but i struggle with the itinerary function but luckily the staff are helpful to let us go through despite the confusion. raincoat is rm10 each but only 1 game is wet. highly recommended for family time young or old the games can accommodate all if you re too tired or old to enjoy the games be sure to check out the shows available! food wise the prices are a bit on the pricey side but not too pricey. also recommended to come and enjoy before 4pm a few staff mentioned it will usually rain around 3.30pm above we did get rained over for awhile.

a world class outdoor and indoor theme parks one hour away from kl. a fabulous away day for the family. some recommendations 1. avoid weekends public holidays 2. take warm clothes. weather is cooler than kl also rain showers 3. arrive early. outdoor theme park closes 6pm and indoor 9pm
a lot of maintainance going on 3 to 5 attraction cant be visit not suggested to go during big holiday wasted hours in the que

the good part weather is cool so queueing and walking is still enjoyable the theme park is not that big you can exit the park for lunch eating at sky avenue mall then reenter the park merchandise price very affordable the not so good 1. very common rides cancelled due to technical difficulities after you had queue for some time 2. rain is very common and in the evening it will be foggy 3. if you have experience disneyland universal studios this theme park feel really underwhelming

genting highlands is a place to put your bet. take out your hard earned money press your luck button and see where your life brings you. 1 weather with a capital w. you can plan all your way. at the end of the day the weather stands between you and the excitement you kept imagining the day before. genting s weather are very predictable actually. 2 the crowd. on certain days of the year genting is overcrowded. you ll find yourselves spending time queueing here and there. download skyworlds app to help you navigate your day. or else chances are you ll be paying a hefty sum for 4 5 rides only. my best top 5 experiences 1 the 3d apes invasion ride 2 id4 defiance 3 alpha pilot 4 terraform tower 5 samba gliders

visited on a public holiday the park is packed. expect to queue for 1 hour to 2 hours for those most popular rides. impossible to cover all rides on a public holiday. the rides availability is very vulnerable to weather. many rides is closed when it rains. sometimes also closed due to technical issues. advisable to bring rain coat and umbrella if you expect rain based on weather forecast. and avoid public holiday and weekend if possible to truly enjoy.

fazira had been very diligent in her service to us as a tour guide in the theme park. attended to all our needs and also gave clear instructions and explanations during the tour. very good experience with the service
we stayed in hotel wyndham and it has beautiful location good for those who want to stay above clouds and breakfast is not at all for those people who prefer indian food . rooms are ok

i recently had the pleasure of visiting genting skyworlds theme park and i must say it was an incredible experience from start to finish. the park offers a perfect blend of thrilling rides captivating attractions and breathtaking views that left me in awe. the attention to detail in the park s design is truly impressive. from the moment you enter you re transported to a world of wonder and excitement. the variety of rides cater to all ages and thrill levels ensuring there s something for everyone to enjoy. whether you re an adrenaline junkie or prefer more relaxed experiences you won t be disappointed.

there are lots of options for kids with a height of more than 100 cm. just not forget to bring either an umbrella or you can buy a plastic jacket when it s raining. there s a small playground next to the ice age area you should visit it! oh the arcade at night at the museum was fun! the food was ok it s quite a big portion and you can share it. ensure that you download the application for virtual queue.
amazing thirlling rides for both children and adults i like most them park on ice age. must to do ride show is independence having breathtaking visual and thrilling experience.

one of the worst these parks that i ve been to we came at the end of december and after paying almost 50 usd person we came to realize that there is a 2 3 hour waiting time for rides that last 1 2 mins. absolutely outrageous and straight out robbery. the games are nothing special. i would suggest to avoid at all costs specially in busy periods.
it was a great experience but they closed the galaxy andromeda for maintenance. such a bad time but we re enjoying our moment

not crowded on a thursday. most rides have just 5 to 10min queue time. need to download the skyworld app to reserve timeslot for selected rides. night at the museum was unfortunately closed that day. the entire park can be covered in 4 to 5 hours without much crowd. overall it is worthwhile to go. cheaper to get the ticket online bought via klook . onsite one day adult pass is 217 rm

we enjoyed our time there. the rides the attractions the cool weather. ohya you guys must check the weather first before go there. we came and it s lightly rain at that time but still can play. but there s one or two rides that we cannot play since they are having technical issue. they fix it try first the ride before people can ride it and still back to fix because still not okay. if im not mistaken it was samba glider ride. we are quite dissapointed cannot play and ride that but sokay lah still got many ride. you guys can buy the tickets online and much cheaper than walk in. there s also wet game so better buy rain coat first. you also can download their apps for the fast lane. no need to wait longer

what a wonderful experience for me. the whole new theme park was so amazing! the only thing that i missed out is the rollercoaster that are not operating atm. spent your day wisely guys use the vq for the ride and make sure you cancel out your slot if you couldn t make it there. theme park staff were superb they did their job well!

skyworlds skyworldsgentinghighlands themepark rides enjoy tickets openingandclosingtime crowd care locker suggestion today me and my friends enjoyed in skyworld theme parks at genting highlands... it was really really very enjoyful visit. it s a very big theme parks. approx 15 types of riding and shows are here. we enjoyed in many rides and visited in many places. ticketsprice tickets price was quite high but ok. we paid rm 189 person. it ll be better if you buy tickets from online it ll be cheaper and it ll save your time. because if you don t buy tickets online then you need to stay in purchasing line. crowd it was very crowded obviously it should be also bcoz park was very good. it was neat and clean staff was also good and friendly. this theme park is really very very beautiful and clouds makes it more beautiful. if i say about it s timing hours of start and close of theme park for visiting it is 11.00 am to 8.00 pm as i got info and tuesday will be closed. locker facility is available and lockers price is depends on locker s size and time duration. we used small locker and price was rm5 hrs in this locker you can keep purse mobile and other small items. big lockers are also available but price is higher then small locker and price increase which depends on used hours. skyworld theme park has it s own application skyworlds which can be use for booking time slots for each rides and show. you can get it on google playstore. overall everything was good for me...

mr adib is a very good guide who had a great flow of which rides to bring us throughout our entire visit! the vip experience was great with multiple perks! will hope to visit again soon with the vip pass

techincal issue technical issue this theme park breaks down more often than a mcdonald s ice cream machine! do not trust the paid 5 star reviews others have put up here. we paid 340 rm and it was the worst investment we ve made so far. could have gone to the indoor park instead of this broken mess... pretty much all of the main attraction rides are either closed or experiencing some unexplainable technical issue. save your money and do something else with it! go and eat good food at the nice restaurants buy yourself something nice! go ride the indoor amusement park! customer service was so rude! we tried to request for a refund at the gate as we could not get on any of the rides but they refused to provide us with even a partial refund. the staff talked to us as if we were idiots for buying the tickets only to find out that their rides don t work as advertised and the policy does not allow refunds. this park has acted in bad faith to its customers and should not be visited! avoid! you have been warned
trip full of love and fun went with family took the cable car best timing to go is weekdays from 10 a.m to enjoy all rides try to book everything online to avoid long qeues

this outdoor theme park is a true marvel of vibrant imaginative architecture. its kaleidoscope of colourful buildings immediately grabs your attention. the amusement rides are a thrilling journey through movie magic especially the iconic drop tower and lifelike 3d interactive motion ride inspired by independence day. inspired by night at the museum family friendly ride attractions add to the excitement. iconic features from ice age and rio further enhance the experience. what s truly remarkable is how this park has evolved in the past decade. i m amazed at the transformation making it a must visit destination for anyone seeking fun adventure and cinematic wonder.

fantastic experience. all the rides were great staff we extremely friendly. it was raining for and hour or two when we came however though outdoor rides were closed we got try indoor ones till the outdoor were subsequently opened up after the rain lightens up.. tips please come in early at 11am.. time just flies and before you know it s it s almost closing time..

overall was fun and nice cooling weather there...few rides kept on having technical issue in a day. need to improve on services by staff...to be more cheerful working in a theme park environment. performances were good and up to the standard especially those bettle singers.
staff service was amazing. vip was very worth it avoided all the 90mins queues. ellya was very sweet so friendly hope we get her as our tour guide next round.
we are enjoying the vip entrence and adib will good guide to all rides and shows

non malaysia nationals pay double the price to locals. the rides and park itself is very good. 90 of the staff are absolutely terrible having terrible customer service skills. long queues and guests are not told that you need to link your purchased tickets to the sky world app to use virtual entry tickets. easily the worst customer service i have scene at a theme park anywhere in the world.
suggest to go with friends or family and please don t afraid of height or your money will burn just like that.there are many attraction there are mostly will be up in the sky.

first time to experience a theme park on highlands. we rode a cable car to get there! it was also a different experience because when we got there it was foggy then later on it became warmer. some rides were temporarily closed. the ones we tried i can say that it is child friendly. not too extreme and good for first timers riding rollercoasters etc. they have an app to see all the rides and waiting time helps you plan out your limited time in the park.

it was a very fun experience! close to 80 of the rides were available. however they are subjected to weather forecast and routine maintenance. nonetheless it did not spoil the fun! most of the rides were thrilling and some were family oriented. surprisingly the queue was not long the most i waited for was 30min. even so i didn t mind queueing in the chilly condition. there is also an app available for virtual queue which allows you to book timeslots for up to 6 rides so do plan accordingly!

my visit was disappointing due to heavy rain rendering the tickets a waste. long queues plagued most games. i advise checking the weather at genting before buying tickets. the skyworld app for vr booking helps shorten wait times .

i bought the ticket easily through the rw genting app just scan and go. don t forget to also install the theme park app so you can book the popular rides in advance and skip the long queues. unfortunately the weather wasn t great when we went and i only managed to try 6 rides. it s better to buy a raincoat outside before entering much cheaper! couldn t take many photos since it kept raining and many rides were closed. honestly with that kind of weather it felt like there wasn t much to do might as well play at the indoor park instead! if you ask whether i d come again maybe in another 10 years and definitely not during bad weather!

the overall experience feels more like visiting a funfair rather than a theme park. too many attractions and rides with technical issues and we were stuck in the middle of the planet of the apes ride for 10 minutes due to technical issues! one star rating is given for a rather unpleasant experience at genting skyworlds theme park. the majority of the fun rides and roller coasters such as samba glider epic voyage to moonhaven ice age expedition thin ice and acorn adventure were closed due to technical issues! shame on this theme park for charging the locals rm170 per entrance but in return providing visitors with a bad experience and lousy maintenance! the only good experience is the staffs at the theme park were friendly. the queue is not needed for the majority of the rides during weekdays.

it was a lot of fun. really loved the ice age themed roller coaster was scary but a fun. overall a very instagrammable place. but the planet of the apes ride had some issues and they told us that we won t be able to get onto the ride after waiting in line for 30 mins. another ride was also closed due to maintenance.

went here to reminisce my childhood memories. this brand new outdoor theme park start operated on 2022. the weather throughout the day are foggy and windy during my visit. tips 1. to compare price at diff websites before purchase the tickets klook shopee genting apps . i bought 2tix for adults at rm200 rm189 for first then add rm11 for 2nd pax genting apps 2. wear covered and most comfortable shoes you have. 3. avoid weekends ph school holiday if possible. i manage to ride all the attractions and did not use my vr. bcs all ride only need 5min queue. 4. bring along your poncho. if not you need to buy rm15 pcs here. 5. only one ride required poncho wet ride epic voyage to moonhaven. 6. the average height for all rides is 110cm below than that not much choices probably around 2 3 rides only.

be warned!!!!! don t waste your money coming here. i m extremely disappointed with genting skyworlds. personally i will never ever visit again. after entering the park almost all the rides we wanted to play were temporary available due to technical issues. i honestly felt cheated paying so much to get in. we had a group of 14 people including kids and it cost me over rm 2 000 yet we could hardly enjoy anything.

top advice visit on weekdays if you can. weekends crowd is a nightmare. lockers are free for the first hour only and is registered using phone numbers. if you plan to stay for the whole day 11am 6pm go with a bigger group so that each of you can take turn to register for free locker. use the app vq to make reservation for certain facilities to save time and skip the queue. all workers and staffs are so friendly hence the lovely vibes. we got to experience every station and some even played twice. would definitely revisit if there s discount on the ticket again

had the best time of my life playing at their theme park. it has tons of varieties of rides for adults and children. food there wasn t expensive as i thought it would provided if you go to their skyworld cafe. the food trucks are very expensive for locals.

it s not so bad. the scenery was awesome. clean and well maintained. friendly staff. not so many games if compared to other international theme parks but for 11am 5pm it is enough. good facilities surau eating places toilet . the toilet was super clean. food is a bit expensive i think it s the same with other theme parks.. so ok lah. overall we had fun.

outdoor indoor theme park .both are just amazing. it takes approximately 2 days to complete both. as theme park shuts by 5.30 6pm. indoor theme park is more for kids outdoor theme park is more for adults. but both are worth visiting. rides are amazing. casinos are worth visiting. genting is active full night. its so much foggy . just amazing view beautiful feeling at genting. must visit .

this place located high so it has cold temperature better bring your jacket. it might seem hot from outside but it will be different once you get in. you need to buy ticket myr 75 for 1 day pass foreign even you just want play 1 2 games from all of them .

rais was excellent tour guide! our tour guide was absolutely amazing! he was very knowledgeable friendly and always made sure everyone felt comfortable and enjoyed the trip. his explanations were clear and interesting and he went above and beyond to make our experience unforgettable. i highly recommend him to anyone visiting the area!

we are having a vip experience with our tour ms.priya. she was good and very friendly and treated us very well. the vip experience is worth it. love the energy and overall everything here is fun. 10 10.

my first visit since its been reopened. place is clean huge and most importantly.. fun! i would recommend booking the tickets through its app because then you get to book the vr queue. helps getting on the rides earlier for some rides only. however if the rides have some technical problems then it will be quite a hassle since you have booked for the next ride. hmmm.. some rides will leave you wet better bring along those raincoats!
hopefully will more movie ride!! the movies ride only have 3 only! so far all the movies ride it was really amazing!!

this park is a drama we were with our kids spend almost 800 rm. part of the attractions were closed due to technical issues at the other ones queues were so long that we lost most of the time to stay to get into one attraction. these attractions have very low capacity so every queue is moving extremely slow . if have need in any european amusement park you will be disappointed

i recently booked the vip experience at genting skyworlds theme park with ellya as our guide and it completely transformed the way we enjoyed the park. from the start ellya was professional warm and very knowledgeable about the park s layout and attractions. she handled all the logistics from tickets to ride scheduling which meant we didn t waste time figuring things out ourselves. her efficiency made the entire day feel effortless. the vip access was a game changer. instead of standing in long queues ellya guided us through priority entrances saving us hours of waiting time. we managed to enjoy almost every major attraction including the thrill rides and family friendly zones without stress. another highlight was how attentive ellya was to our group. she constantly checked on us adjusted the pace when needed and even gave us great tips for dining and shopping around the resort. her friendly personality and patience really made the experience feel personal and special. the park itself was beautiful the theming the cool highland weather and the variety of rides all came together perfectly. but honestly having ellya as our vip guide made all the difference. instead of a tiring day with long lines and confusion it felt like a smooth enjoyable luxury experience. highly recommend booking the vip package with ellya if you want to maximize your time skip the stress and create amazing memories at genting skyworlds. worth every cent.

the theme park was kids friendly. pram was available for rent. expect some wet while having boat ride at rio s! perfect place for kids considering the thrive level not really thrilling as compared to uss singapore . price was reasonable as a theme park.

great service from yusri! he was friendly attentive and very helpful throughout the process. everything was handled smoothly and professionally. really appreciate his effort and support. highly recommended! mary team

our first time going to genting and it is fantastic. we stayed at skyworld hotel because it s near the theme park we could walk there no need for transportation . the skyworld theme park itself is super nice. with lots of rides. me and my husband really enjoy our vacation. i really love samba glider and the ice age coaster best ride imo. my husband likes the planet of the apes ride he s a fan of the movies. it s such a bummer that night at the museum ride is closed due to maintenance. it s one of the rides that i really want to try. we bought the tickets on klook no need to print it just scan qr code on the gates. we went here on wednesday 12th march the sun is out no rain perfect weather the ques are short because it s on a workday fasting month of ramadan ! super nice would we come back to genting skyworld theme park? yes definitely
christmas eve go queue 1hour and half then the acorn adventure game something wrong then cannot play all also queue for long time until before 6pm close the facilities very bad the experience
wonderful journey with ms. nurin. what a great weekend visiting genting. definitely great experience subscribe vip pass.
good place to spend an entire day. few rides and zones will be closed no matter how prepared and planned you go. still a good place to enjoy in genting.

for soft opening still consider very nice the weather is cold when queue to play something also won t feel tired. in malaysia this is my favorite theme park at the moment. some facilities still not yet open because currently still under soft opening they also will provide us free return ticket if heavy rain. can have fun at there and very recommend the burger in the theme park very delicious. very enjoy the moment at there already came for 3 times from the soft opening started.
very affordable tickets at about rm60 per pax with world class attractions. only turn off was super long queues and waiting times 1 hour! . food is of course expensive rm20 30 for hot dog etc .

skyworld hotel nice facilities rooms were great with nice cooling enviroment next to it is a theme park very convenient and there is big shopping centre and vast options of restaurants and snack stores. the only thing to give feedback about sound insulation is cars with loud exhaust noise and party goers. trying to sleep through the night can be challenging especially for light sleepers... this is a nice place for a short getaway with family

had an amazing day at genting highlands skyworld theme park with my two boys! we braved all the thrilling rides and enjoyed the nice cool weather it couldn t have been more perfect. moments like these remind me how precious family time is. familytime skyworldadventures makingmemories

the theme park is not so large but enough to spend your entire day here. we went on weekday so we didn t have to queue for so long. the longest we queued was about 30mins on average queue time was from 3 5mins to 10mins. they say you have 3 virtual queues but actually you only have 1 or 2 depends on which rides you choose if you choose bootcamp and global defender they are vq required so you only have one vq left . moreover you have to store your phone or belongings in the locker unless you have someone help you keep those stuff outside. during our visits we didn t have any issues like ride closed ride maintained or sudden rain. only bootcamp training open 2 hours late and planet of the apes closed for 1 hour but after we rode it. rides rating must try for everyone worth queuing good to use vq independent day acorn adventure samba glider bootcamp training zipline is fun too thrill and terrible terraform tower global defender alpha fighter good for kids rio carnaval epic rides both voyage and flyers ice age rides robot rivet town rides most boring don t waste time queuing or using vq for these rides even kids think those are bad night at the museum bad 3d images broken playing gun no exciting at all planet of the apes boring didn t meet our expectations no climax no memorable actions just meh

with pahangnese promo rm36 rm3 tax i d say its worth it. though the its very foggy in the morning and lot of rides were closed due to rainy weather. the staff is very friendly and helpful. may there be a 2nd time.
nice and cooling weather but only at night. theme park was beautiful value for money. allow re entry to the park for the day with tickets with registered fingerprints onsite.

out door park things to do before going pack raincoats umbrella pre buy your admission tickets online cheaper and can get combo deals eg with cable car included download genting sky worlds app into your phone this app functions much like the disney universal studios apps that show various ride wait times if they re closed and you can also link your tickets to the app to reserve spaces in virtual ride queues for a certain timing range. do note that virtual q is not the same as an express pass disney plus ride that u would have topped up for. virtual queue simply means a slightly shorter wait time for the ride eg if the wait time is 90 min long u may still have to queue for 60 min despite your virtual queue reservation . it rained halfway in the day so i had to go buy their theme park rain coat at rm15. good if you bring your own as the weather is so unpredictable. the admission tickets turned out really quite expensive given that quite a few rides were closed under maintenance testing due to the bad weather! this also made other ride wait times longer queued at least 20 25 min for acorn coaster only to hear announcement that there s a technical fault and everyone had to leave the queue. some food stalls were closed. for peak period pricing it is expected for everything to be in tip top functioning condition and open! some staff also seemed to do things in an uncoordinated slow fashion. like checking of safety belts for the independence day ride this staff walked down the row for ?visual inspection and then walked back the other way to check safety belts. why not do one shot? the inefficient loading and unloading of some rides were really annoying to observe. some good things about the park cool weather made the wait times less annoying most staff generally friendly and helpful can bring own food and drink into the park and allow multiple entries to find preferred food outside which some other parks disallow
first day of ramadan less people and really short wait time for all rides coupled with promotion price ticket. value for money
it s not just a theme park it s a cool escape

located at genting highlands n opens from 11am 6pm daily except tuesdays. however tuesdays are open on public n school holidays. rides are based mainly on movie themes of 20th century fox in usa. there are some thrilling rides especially independance day with a seating capacity of 76 people. sometjing similar to imax theatres. waiting time like 20min even on saturdays. at 5.15pm a parade round the park mainly westerners in costumes n end up near main entrance for photo shots. strollers can be rented n raincoats can be purchased costing rm20!! seniors above 60years have discounted pricing but it is a bit cist saving to purchase tickets online.

surprisingly good. not that big. not too small. ride well maintained. friendly staff. food drink inside was expensive. just bring your own from outside. they dont check your bag. dont forget to bring your ic to get citizen rate. pictures or photocopies of ic was not accepted.
some ride like samba glider global defender epic voyage to moonhaven sid rock n slide are closed.. some staff unfriendly dissapointed because hospitality for place like this is number 1

genting skyworlds is a thrilling amusement park located in the genting highlands of malaysia. it s a world class destination that offers a unique blend of adventure entertainment and immersive experiences for visitors of all ages. key features nine themed worlds the park is divided into nine distinct themed worlds each inspired by popular movies and franchises like ice age rio robots epic night at the museum planet of the apes sons of anarchy and independence day. thrilling rides and attractions genting skyworlds boasts a wide range of thrilling rides and attractions including roller coasters water rides dark rides and interactive experiences. some of the popular rides include the riddick s dark fury and the despicable me minion mayhem. immersive theming the park s attention to detail is evident in its immersive theming which transports visitors to different worlds and creates a truly magical experience. live entertainment in addition to rides and attractions genting skyworlds offers a variety of live entertainment options including parades street performances and character meet and greets. dining and shopping the park features a diverse range of dining options from casual eateries to fine dining restaurants. there are also numerous shops where visitors can purchase souvenirs and merchandise.

it s a totally different world about an one hour drive and 10 mins cable car ride away from kl. great weather and lots lots of fun rides. please plan for an entire day here just to cover the skyworld outdoor theme park activities. if you intend to partake in the indoor activities also then plan staying in genting. this place is absolutely amazing. a beautiful experience.

not worth it. only 3 rides are worth the wait. and my biggest problem was the vq system. where you book and it goes unavailable at the last minute. they said i can come back later and showy vq but i was rejected saying they only except from 2.40 pm when on the app the vq was unavailable at 2.10pm and my number was at 2.20pm. this is ridiculous . please fix your que system and the messy and regular unavailable rides.

had so much fun despite the super freezing weather due to the drizzle thick fog. every ride was enjoyable although i didn t get to try a few bcs the waiting time was too long and some rides were closed due to the weather. of all rides i d tried ice age acorn adventure was the most thrilling imo. for those people who plan to come i highly suggest you to download the skyworld genting app so you can book the rides virtually instead of having to wait in a long que. but one thing that i wish can be improved is their musolla. it has this musty smell that can be very uncomfortable.

there are 9 zones is zones each has different rides. there are roller coaster rides 3d interactive zones fun zone for small kids and many other rides. best ride was the independence day defiance. you can save time by downlaoding their app through which you can get vip entry for 3 rides. boot camp ride can be accessed only through vip booking.

they charge 4 times more for a tourist than for a local. then you are herded into lines and treated like trash. the staff are rude! they don t speak but instead gesture with their fingers. you are forced to buy an adult ticket for a 7 year old due to height but no rides accommodate. there is a 60 70 minute wait for each ride and they push others ahead of you no explanation. avoid this place. its a rip off.will never go back and will spread this negative feedback whenever possible!

this is our first time here the weather is filled with fog and cant see clearly with some drizzle of rain but still ok for us. sadly quite a lot of ride that we are interested in either closed or having some technical issues. so its been a bump for us. advise not to come during rainy seasons. we tried the churros in the park its really good. moist and crunchy.
very nice theme park. weather is cold. download the apps and u can book for the ride and see the time wait for each ride from your phone. nice attractions too! deff come back again

the theme park suitable for adults like us. the decoration and design for each theme so fascinating and good for photograph the food and drink also good the place clean the staff helpfull. i will recommend this park to anybody who wants to have fun in malaysia they should try.

love the cable car ride! the theme park was a bit of a letdown for us while we were there it started raining so some of the rides closed while others were operating. food is galore prices are a little high. for a few of the outdoor rides you ve got to leave your belongings in a lockers pay with card only. they operate with only online booking for a few rides as well so be sure to check up in advance and book your space! it was a bit of a damper for us. the whole space is quite big alot of walking the indoor rides are great for smaller kids. the rollercoaster inside was amazing! a huge adrenaline rush. recommend to anyone who has a love for that. the whole experience is very fun and i would go there again
outdoor theme park in genting. the virtual queue helps to reduce waiting line and can enjoy more rides

love this entertainment city.. i m still amaze at how genting have changed through the years an still maintaining the original concept of this place.. love that there s always things to do to keep everyone busy and the variety of cuisines offered here and most of it within walking distance and of course the comfortable weather if it s not raining.

went here straight at 10am and enjoying rides with almost no queue. what a great experience! make sure to bring your jackets and raincoats during this foggy season as you will get a bit wet and feel cold while riding. recommended rides independence day

erin has been very accommodative friendly down to earth. kids have a fun loving time with her. she has given the parents a peace of mind while taking good care of the kids. definitely a memorable one with likelihood to bring kids back under her care

we had a great experience going to the skyworld theme park. the ticket costs rm150 per person and it was worth it. we ride almost all rides and every ride was very fun. waiting time for each ride was within 10 20 minutes. the food was very nice and afforable.

extremely disappointed that most major funrides are closed due to technical issues. it feels like our money was wasted on tickets. to add to that some rides require an additional payment for lockers which is absurd . what a clever way to squeeze more money out of visitors.

very disappointed with my vacation. for malaysian definitely not worth the price. it cost rm151 person and most of the attraction are having technical issue. not only that the waiting time is insane as it take around 40 minute for each attraction as the queue is very long. not recommended

i was very disappointed with my experience at genting skyworlds theme park. despite spending a lot of time queuing for several rides many of them were suddenly closed due to technical issues just as it was almost our turn. this happened more than once which made the long waiting time feel completely wasted. what was most frustrating is that no proper compensation or alternative solution was offered after we had already queued for a long time. considering the ticket price this level of ride reliability is unacceptable. the park itself is visually impressive and the weather is nice but the poor ride maintenance and frequent technical disruptions seriously affected the overall experience. it was hard to enjoy the park when plans kept changing and time was lost waiting in queues that led nowhere. i hope management will seriously improve ride reliability communication and guest handling when technical problems occur. not worth the money! disappointing!!!!!!!!

went here last year with family and had a blast! they really have it all from roller coasters to photo booth. they also have a bunch of themes for the roller coasters like the ice age one and there was a rio themed one and a bunch more. overall it a great place to spend the holidays with family. really would love to go there again.
not much thing to play. most is close.
1st time here in genting highlands with family. enjoy skyworld theme park lots of rides food and fun. will come again

the newly opened skyworlds theme park is generally not as bad as what others described. it s quite a good theme park comparable to other more popular ones. as of posting about 80 of the rides are operationally ready. queues are also very short about 10 mins per ride early nov 2022 . the app is also quite ok simple to navigate and easy to book timeslots for the rides although we don t need to do that due to the short queues . take note that you can only scan in your ticket qr after scanning it and entering the park. you need to scan your ticket qr in order to book the time slots for the rides.
very fun! save so much time! no need to que at all! really worth the with the vip pass. thank you so much to ms batrisya for being a very wonderful tour guide to us.
great place to chill especially bila discounted price ticket.

super disappointed the park crew is nonchalant. the wait times are over 3 hours on the good rides. the crew is still ending empty coasters without asking if anyone wants to go in solo. they oversold the number of tickets and can t handle the crowd. this is peak greediness.

took 1 hr or more per adult ride if you are in the normal lane. some rides are under maintenance while others are being open and then closed again. you also need to pay for an additional locker fee just for the rollercoaster.
mohamad rais was our tour guide for the vip experience. he was amazing in communication respectfulness and provided really good service. would come back again! worth the money spent.

theme park indore and out door is good but people who like rides it s ok but can not compare with universal studio. all shows will be over before 3 to 4. if you are going to stay for 2 days can see all places. if you are intrested in casino then 1 day is ok.

the roller coaster ride was way fun compared to the old ones but the ride was way shorter. the downside the rain it was raining since 10am so some of the facilities were closed some are under maintenance for technical issues. raincoat are sold at an absurd price so better bring your own raincoat. also remember to download the skyworld app and do your vq reserve. normally you would have to wait for a good 30 minutes for your turn but with vq reserve you could enjoy more with lesser waiting time.

i did not stay here however i tried the games excellent experiences nice and friendly service with foods indoor a chilling day was made. however if you come in rainy season which is from october until february then high chances are foggy

it s a new experience however you will spend your day in qs waiting for your turn in general we entered 11 o clock and get out 6 pm but we could ride only four games the only good thing is genting weather we were five and they around 900 ringgit

fun place to be for those who love adventurous rides but many rides were not working so felt that cannot stand upto the price paid for it.. mini version of universal studios singapore. overall a good experience. if you have kids and you yourself love to enjoy rides then do visit

it s not worth going on weekends. i had to wait 15 to 30 minutes to get into the main games. they divided guests into two lines with locals or priority customers getting in first while hundreds of foreign visitors had to wait. there were many chinese tourists cutting in line without queuing. the staff didn t stop them.

such a fun theme park for the family. many rides were down with technical issues including the 2 biggest attractions independence day and planet of the apes so if ure going for these.. i duno when it will be ready. but the park is beautiful staffs are friendly. its not as popular anymore i think because they dont maintain the rides well some have never been open since their opening. i hope they improve or theyll lose many customers soon. but i will always support malaysian to improve and have the opportunity to be world class. good luck genting

we came here on a weekday and a lot of the rides are not open due to technical issues. it was disappointing because most of the thrill rides were closed. we also got stuck for about 15 mins in one of the rides known as terraform due to technical issues. some of the plus points are they have a virtual queue systems which is really useful when it comes to planning your rides. the are also many lockers available which is free for the first hour. so you can place your valuables in the lockers if you want. there isn t much options for food within the outdoor theme park. fortunately you are able to exit and re enter the park. so my advice is to have a meal in the shopping mall where the indoor theme park is located. the park is actually nice and well designed if all the rides are available.

great weather and a great place for families with young kids to spend their afternoon. do take note that purchasing tickets can be both virtual and on site. no cash transaction for ticketing! if my 6 yo daughter can ride the roller coaster i believe u guys out there can do it too. please scream out loud and let go yourself and have fun!

the game is quite good with many interesting photo spots the only downside is that you can t enter the extreme rides because your bag has to go in a locker while all the lockers are full you need more lockers or there should be temporary storage near the entrance you can follow universal studios singapore s example
well done genting very good should bring in more rides

the new genting themepark was great. during the visit the weather quite foggy windy and cold but we still had so much fun. do buy your ticket online because is much more cheaper and the ticket should link to their genting skyworld apps. all the staff are friendly too

i went there last week and the experience was literally breathtaking. everyone there was literally so nice. aman was our photographer and he was so enthusiastic about taking our photo and teaching us how to download our photos. location wise was so chilling and the view was amazing. everything was fun and it was a smooth experience. i would definitely go there again.

syakir has provided excellent service with a positive attitude to add on. he has made my family first visit to skyworld genting memorable and pleasant. had such a great experience here with his vip guide. thanks syakir! keep up the good work!

price rm151 per pax went on a weekday and it wasn t too crowded. didn t have to queue more than 15 minutes for any of the rides. the app is very useful and easy to use. you can make vq reservations via the app for ride bookings. most of the rides closed when it started raining but because there was a rainy day guarantee they allowed us to come back another day within 6 months. the rides were quite fun. there are both thrilling and mild rides suitable for all ages. can t wait for it to be fully opened so we can try everything! the live shows can be better as it was honestly quite boring. as for food we had the tacos and giant hot dog. both were pretty good and reasonably price. it was rm20 for 3 tacos and rm22 for an 18 inch hot dog. all these food were sold at stalls that are away from the dining areas. so it is difficult to buy when it rains because you have to carry your food under the rain.
this vip tour experience is excellent! we enjoy so much. i wanna give a compliment to hairi. he is a great tour guide assisted us a lots.

disappointed experience as skyworld outdoor themepark is unfortunately not toddler friendly at all. overly tight height requirement for all the rides. we understand and agree that safety guideline is important to be put into place and executed but even merry go around has height requirement of 80cm and above even with parents accompanying is hillarious.

genting highland is my favorite place in malaysia. my family visited here many times but it s our first time visiting the outside thema park. it was a fantastic place for my kids. even though there were so many people for holiday there we enjoyed riding attractions.

this outdoor park is a must visit theme park! there are many adventurous rides and it is very enjoyable. the main attraction is the climate. there is always a breeze and fog around this outdoor park. there are many caf s and restaurants in this park that serve many asian dishes. themepark adventure climate breeze fog cafes restaurants asiandishes

we had booked the vip experience.. ellaya and haira were our guide. the overall experience and service provided by them was comfortable and smooth i would highly recommend booking vip service if you want hassle free experience and skip the long queue

we got there late but thankfully buying the vip experience was a good call. our tour guide firdaus was so friendly and helpful! please give the man a medal!! i d highly recommend the vip experience if you don t want to wait in line especially for the popular rides that can have waiting times of 50 minutes to an hour.

attended the theme park as a solo tourist and the entry prices were quite reasonable even with the photo package i opted for. the photo package gives you unlimited digital downloads and includes one print in a branded folder. a lot of the rides were closed due to the weather and or renovations so i can t say much about some of those. the design of the park and its attractions are a lot more elaborate and than some theme parks in australia as nearly half the entry price. the food is average but that is to be expected of a theme park but still a better selection than some theme parks i ve been to. the rain was a bit of a buzz kill bit there was ponchos being sold at all the souvenir shops around the park to make it a little less unpleasant walking to and from different spots around the park. the lines at some rides were quick long some up to 45mins wait even with a reservation would could be made conveniently through their app. i would recommend this park for ages 7 12 as there is only a couple of rides for thrillseeking adults or teens. worth a visit but for your own sake please check the weather before booking your tickets definitely not worth the money paid if it is bucketing down with rain all day.

most dissapointing theme park ever. i m giving this theme park 1 star for many reasons which i will state down below. likes cable car ride to the theme park. this was really cool and super cheap. also includes a free stop at chan swee temple which is worth a visit. location. the location is awesome located like 1800 meters high in the mountains. nice shopping mall and outlet on the way. simple ticketing system. but this is where my reasons for liking the park stops. dislikes overpriced theme park. compare it to any other higher quality park in asia and you will see skyworlds is way more expensive. extremely long down time on rides and very frequent maintenance required causing more down time. i tried to go on the ice age rollercoaster then got told that we can t bring any bags not even a fanny pack lol??? . this was after the ride was finally fixed. so i went to the lockers which were full. went to another locker area further away and then realized that the lockers are not even free lockers are extremely pricey and are forced upon you. never been to a theme park where i couldn t store my bag for free at the ride itself. after paying for the locker i was finally able to go back to the ride which accumulated a 1 hour queue. after waiting in queue for 45 minutes it went down again because of the rain and i was forced to leave the queue once again. there s not many rollercoasters. so eventually i got to ride the ice age rollercoaster which was a mediocre experience. the ride was nicely decorated had some decent viewpoints but overall just a very mediocre ride. because of the rain we were forced to use raincoats. once again i was forced to pay in order to enjoy the park. this seems to be an reoccuring thing at skyworlds. no entertainment in the park nothing exciting for kids nor for adults. very mediocre experience walking around the park. the mobile application was completely useless and all it did was show me that none of the rollercoasters that actually looked cool were ready. skyworlds advertises and promotes rides that aren t even finished yet. in the app it will show as if it is ready to ride until you fully open the ride and read future in small letters. very misleading. after spending 2 and a half hours in the park and being consistantly disappointed me and my girlfriend decided it s time to leave because literally everything was closed in the park due to the weather. we left the park and i went to the customer service. described the situation shared my complaints and told them i m truly disappointed by the whole experience and misleading advertising. i requested a refund but got stared at as if they saw the 3rd coming of jesus. i asked if they could do anything for me but got told that only if i went back into the park waited for 2 hours i could be eligible for a free entry coupon for the next day even though i was leaving malaysia the next day . i told them that s completely pointless for me and requested a refund due to the awful experience and everything being closed down. they said they can t do anything for me. note that i also asked the staff at the theme park if they could transfer my skyworlds ticket to a skytropolis ticket which is their smaller indoor theme park . i told them i don t need the money back for the price difference it s half the price and that i just want to have a fun time with my girlfriend. this was impossible after this experience i tried reaching out to skyworlds through email and got offered a 50 discount coupon for 2 tickets for skyworlds. i obviously can t use this because i m not traveling to kl again anytime soon. after once again telling them about this fact my emails were ignored. this is the first time i ever had a negative experience with a theme park. i ve been to various theme parks in the world every in the netherlands numerous in germany numerous in thailand disney in paris and california and us in florida. compared to any other theme park experience genting skyworlds was the worst of all. headache 1 out of 10.

genting highlands skyway skytropolis experience skyway theme park our family had planned to enjoy the skyway rides but unfortunately the experience was disappointing. app reservation issues the booking system was confusing and the reservation time provision made it difficult to secure rides. ride availability many rides were unavailable during our scheduled time. connectivity problems internet outages added to the frustration making it impossible to manage reservations smoothly. weather interruptions rain further disrupted the schedule leaving us unable to enjoy the outdoor attractions. the management should prioritize on proper app usage before issuing tickets so guests don t face unnecessary hurdles. overall impression while the skyway left us disappointed due to operational and technical issues skytropolis indoor theme park saved the day with its reliable rides and lively atmosphere. if you re visiting genting highlands the indoor park is a safer bet for guaranteed fun especially when the weather or technology doesn t cooperate.
craziest team building ever! my jantung jatuh on genting theme park ... the sky guardian are very helpful and awesome!

it s a must to download the genting virtual queue app n book your ride before enter or else u need to physically queue on the walk in lane which is very long compare to vq lane. there is more than 3 attraction rides is not open. toilets are clean but still overcrowded. small locker is provide in the theme park with rm5 per hour rate. it s very sunny and no cold breeze. few rides i love the most is that give rider to control the 360 rotation mainly in the robot space theme section. experience few rides that face technical problems throughout the day and become temporarily unavailable. overall i have a great time there but it s very crowded during the weekend and the longest walk in queue i waited was 90min and the ride only last below 3min. so choose wisely to prioritise the most wanted rides. never know when the rides status will become unavailable again. have fun and stay safe.
first time had a good experience all rides was good show was the thing better to booking ticket through online you will get a better discount you can try once
