while it is not fully operational yet there are some interesting rides among those that are already opened to the public. however there are still some teething problems with the park. during my recent visit one of the rides closed just as we were about to get on. only explanation given? technical problem. no apologies from the staff operating the ride. then we headed to the night at the museum ride. it is an on rails ride with some interactive 3d shooting. a couple of minutes into the ride it stopped. had to wait about 10 minutes before the ride was cancelled and returned to the starting point. again no apologies or even a way for us to retake the ride without queuing up again. the rest of the rides were fortunately uneventful.
great theme park with many different activities and rides. book in advance from their website for better prices. tickets bought on spot may cost more.

finally visited after such a long wait! not much thrilling rides. place is quite big. we walked alot. queues were long like any other theme park. still plenty of room for improvements. hopefully the next time we visit all the rides will be up! overall still a good place to visit especially with such cooling weather

it was a great experience overall visited during the weekend theres not much crowd. the staffs are helpful and friendly they will ask you to take photos which is free. the mobile app also very useful you can download the photos and reserve for virtual queue. facilities and environment is good big and beautiful theme park. recommended to try independent day! will definitely be back!

the most stupid system of management ever. 1. most of the popular riders are closed 2. for group visitors i believe 99 ppl don t visit a theme park alone you need to create a group before making a group reservation on vq and you need to cancel all the reservation before you create a group . as a result we lost all of our existing reservations. the system doesn t allow us to go in together if we book different slots separately. 3. you need to make a reservation on vq but it doesn t means you are saving the time. you are just having a right to queue. some projects doesn t even allow you to q or make vq after 12pm

genting skyworlds theme park offers a fantastic experience with diverse attractions and thrilling rides. the park is well maintained and the staff is friendly. however the long wait times for some rides can be a drawback and less activities for kids. overall it s a great destination for adventure.

it s a great and mist amazing experience to spend time a whole day at genting skyworlds center at malaysia. thrilling experience with cable car reaching center and felt as we are going to disembark in the middle. there are amusing games wonderful settings of pictures appeared as studio setting. when we alighted it appered as dark sky in an enclosed roof top. an insight into busy casino was remarkable. thrilling and amusing games are plenty. children and ladies were enjoying most with worthy tume spent. restaurants were moderately charging for their food items and all items were fresh and delicious. lifelong remembering photos could be taken. some special shows by artistes like music and dance worthy mentioning. the company of mixed race cultured and decent behaviour of the people and untired staff s service is appreciated. enough space provided to avoid rush.

do take note that online ticket prices are much cheaper than buying at the counter self ticketing counters and the online sale for non malaysian is available only one day in advance. the rides were better than my expectations but do take note of the height restrictions and the staff do check the kid s height before allowing entry to the rides. the independence day ride was the best for us.

it was our first visit to genting skyworlds and sadly the overall experience was underwhelming. one of the biggest letdowns happened at the ice age expedition thin ice attraction. after queuing patiently for nearly an hour we were told the ride had broken down. no updates. no clear instructions. just an option wait indefinitely or leave the line. hundreds of visitors like us were left standing confused and frustrated time and energy wasted. beyond that the park lacked proper direction. there were no visible signs guiding us to attractions or amenities and although staff members were around very few offered assistance or seemed available when help was needed. the entire day ended up being spent waiting in lines with just one ride to show for it. having been to universal studios singapore before i expected a similar level of planning and guest care. unfortunately this visit didn t come close. genting skyworlds has potential but the service communication and park organization need serious improvement.

soft opening pricing ticket at rm151. since it is soft opening many games still not available to play but bcos is soft opening the pricing is cheaper lesser ppl and can use the vq reservation in other country like disney land or universal studios normally they is a surcharge for this . basically the vq reservation is u can reserve yr slot that u wanna play and cut the queue. the must play game is the independence day is a 6d ride very real! the epic voyage also not bad . just u will get wet. the rest of the game kinda too short probably 2min for each ridewhile u hv to line up quite some time. a lot ppl line up for the samba glider make sure u reserve it if u wanna play. the boot camp training look nice also but make sure u wear shoes sandal and slipper is not allow. food wise the classic burger is nice! rm25 with one huge burger and drink. worth the price. the giant size hotdog can try only rm22. the pita can skip not nice basically the ride too short while the queue too long if not using the vq reservation i think probably will skip it. except the independent day is nice

very disappointing experience. the skyworld app was experiencing technical issues which meant we had to queue physically for almost an hour just to have our tickets manually linked to the app. since access to all rides requires the app we couldn t enjoy any attractions until this was resolved. despite only having about six people ahead of us the service at the counter was extremely slow. after finally getting the tickets linked we still had to queue manually at each ride there was no compensation or virtual queue access provided to make up for the lost time. please improve your guest services and ensure there s a well planned backup system in place for technical issues like this. it s frustrating for guests to suffer due to problems on your end.

good place for family bonding. we only visited the place to experience the gondola ride. we did not puchase tickets to the theme park since we have limited time. we enjoyed riding the glass floor gondola as it was a 720 degree view. i would suggest that you book regular ordinary goldola going up as the ride moves quite fast. then book the glass floor going down back since the gondola is much slower which will give you better video photos.

the outdoor theme park is designed in a manner reminiscent of universal studios. to avoid potential queues it is advisable to book your tickets in advance. it presents an excellent opportunity to enjoy quality time with family and friends. numerous renovation projects are currently underway. if you are considering visiting both the indoor and outdoor theme parks in a single day it may be challenging to experience all the attractions. therefore it is recommended to plan your visit accordingly.

amazing place actually with lots of place to go. a big howerver because the ques is actually so damn long making you unable to play all the game inside. one of the biggest downfall is when someplace only allow virtual queue vq which seem unfair for others who enjoyed waiting for their turn.

we had visited on monday 29th dec and from the first ride itself we faced a lot of difficulties. they asked us to register for a qv code on their website in order to sit in the ride. this was inspite of us standing in their queue. this system of qv code was highly flawed as everyone wouldn t be having access to internet to download the same and though we tried to do it several times we couldn t register. this code was also needed if we wanted to fast track our rides. this too wasn t explained very well by the staff present there so we are not sure about the same. the ride samba gliders in the rio section had a huge waiting time of 120 180 minutes which was just ridiculous!! we got our turn after 2 hours and 15 minutes and it was thoroughly exhausting to line up for any other ride after that. we do not know if this is the case because of the holidays but clearly it was the longest that we have waited in any theme park and we have been to disney land ocean park warner bros ferrari world etc to name a few.

many of the rides were exciting but might be too much for those weak of heart. it drizzled and was misty in the afternoon so it didn t feel too hot. some rides may require a bit of wait but fortunately we planned in advance and managed to get the rides we wanted.
thank you misha really appreciate for help and consideration to enjoy our trip. is a challenge day due to raining. but she always give us suggestion and help us to always enjoy all the way. thank you

got the vip experience at the park. we were given our own tour guide rais as part of the package. he was very knowledgeable in the park s layout and not to mention also very polite and kind throughout our whole experience. would very much recommend the vip experience as we had a great time

easily got lost. parked in one parking lot.. went inside mall hotel theme park to buy coffee.. suddenly you are lost. the apps doesn t help the staff security guard gave mixed confusing contradicting direction. same goes with the signage. spent rm17 for parking just to get back to car.

very famous attraction in kl and it is a must see. you can make as one day trip it takes around 2 house from kl. but make sure to start early from your hotel. some tips try to avoid weekends it might be a it cold especially for kids. so take for the suitable wear.

we ve been to 3 disneylands just back from the paris one and i have to say skyworlds deserved better ratings! kudos to the team behind this park we didn t expect this but many of the rides and experiences are world class! love the independence day ride! yes some rides are not opened yet or closed due to technical issues but this is soft opening so manage your expectations. in disneylands we have seen many more experiences are under maintenance so it s normal for theme parks. the park is small so pick a good day to avoid the crowd and you can easily finish almost all the rides and experiences from 11am to 6pm. bring your own umbrella or raincoat too if it s going to rain. it s just that many experiences are more skewed to boys rather than girls. also most of the vr glasses are dirty so it will be great if you can mass clean or disinfect them. everything else is perfect great job!

fun theme park with chill weather. sadly not all rides are opened yet and some rides experienced technical difficulties when people already queued in. however we still enjoyed our visit and the independence day ride is a must go!

fun place to take a quality time with your friends or family they have very high standard for safety very very high standard. the 20th fox studio take over now nice by the way a fun place to spend your time here.

if there s one word to describe this theme park it s mediocre . while me and my party were well aware that this park s rides and attractions were nowhere close to 100 operation they could do more to make sure that the general public is made aware of the situation. many of the major rides and attractions are still coming soon as they claim who knows when that will be. for the rides that were available queue time was very bearable as it was the middle of the week. while some of the rides were fun they pale in comparison if you have been to better theme parks overseas. so it s best to manage your expectations. unfortunately the weather did not hold up and it was raining on and off frequently. and when it rains most rides are either halted due to weather or may faced technical difficulties . fortunately genting has a rainy day guarantee policy so i guess i ll be heading sometime in the next 12 months.
miza patiently guided us through each game and took great care of us with this vip pass we didn t have to wait for anything it was absolutely worth it.

enjoyed my time here. the weather maybe not very clear but the temperature are comfortable enough for visitor to wonder around and enjoy the places. the games and attraction also many the place for food also great.

came on a weekend saturday of a long weekend merdeka weekend . each person gets 3 vq passes virtual queue where you select a specific time slot and get to skip the queue. technically you get an express line in but it s not exactly short. theme park wise it was ok. rides were quite limited still and some weren t working. light rain towards the evening and we left after. i would go back in the future on a weekday and when more rides open up.

i can t give 5 yet because there s a lot of rides that still under construction. so i don t think it is worth my money fully. a lot of the rides on the right side of the park are kids friendly on the other side it is extreme. advisable to download the apps because they have a virtual que where you booked the famous ride. oh advisable for everyone to bring their own raincoat.

some game station will at rest mode for maintenance... so have to come back even had make an appointment in apps. not able to play all games due to the crowd. if at promo price ok to play. if at original price... is bit too pricey.

we absolutely loved it! being only 1hr drive away from kuala lumpur it made for a great day trip. the mall is huge with plenty of options for shopping and dining. the adjacent theme park was a blast. even though 2 of the rides we wanted to try were closed for technical rehearsal we still had a great time on the available rides. the independence day vr simulator was amazingly immersive and my favourite stop during our time at the theme park. we also loved the dawn of the planet of the apes attraction the amount of details in the rooms was incredible. it was obvious a lot of thought and work was put into it. the wait time for the rides varies between 10 to 30 minutes but you might cut that time in half with their app and virtual queue . there s plenty of options for kids but also for adrenaline looking adults. if you plan on visiting check the weather in advance. we were told the admission tickets for the outdoor theme park are non refundable in case of bad weather.

we are stuck right now on this ride planet of ape for over 40 min. with the amount we paid to come to this park this was not what i expected. absolutely unacceptable!! we will never be back again!! also soo many rides are not operating. they need seriously good maintenance system.

i stay in this hotel during my stay. everything was fine but sound insulation was so bad. every single night i can hear ppl closed the door with bang sound and ppl talking laughing so loud in the midnight btw 11.30pm to 1.30am. i called 0 for 3 times but nobody pickup. when i checked out asked ladies about the working hour she replied 24 hours !!!!! why nobody pickup my call??? no replied !! not recommended for old folk to stay at the block called valley wing need to walk super far.

i don t know which lucky bunch of people got to go for the rides without long waits. each ride too almost an hour for us to go. half the games were showing fully booked by 12pm. you can only book 4 rides for an itinerary and you d miss the 2nd ride by the time you re done with your first ride. don t waste your money. better go to sunway lagoon or splashmania. wasted.

batrisyia was an awesome guide to the tour of the theme parks and ride. i am so happy that we went with her and she made us all comfortable and smiling all the time. introduced us with everyride and also clicked good pictures of ours very nice guide she is 10 10 for her and due to her the theme park also gets 10 10. yuhuuuuuuuuuu
erin made our vip experience excellent. she was professional attentive and ensured everything ran smoothly from start to finish. her support made the visit easy and truly memorable. thank you erin.

genting is a cool place to visit. not only the weather. the rides were in most working order and the staff organized things well. manage your expectations you look at boards in different areas in the park telling ride to wait times. food is more to pay but really you re at an amusement park. the fuel injector 18 inch hotdog meant for sharing. it fed 3 of us no problem. rm 33. the tacos was an experience.

great value for money as far as theme parks go. queues are not that long and rides are good fun. many were not operating the day we went so best to check on the app to make sure your favourites are available. it is quiet a walk from the gondolas so if your getting there for opening leave early.
bought the value for money rm65 ticket.if you wanna beat the que do your virtual que bookings!

not coming back for another 3 years at least. almost rm180 per ticket and most rides were either breaking down or under maintenence. not one roller coaster was working. food options limited and pricey. forced luggage storage last min before rides at rm25 for the day. merchandise is average and not related to thr rides.

it was a sunday the crowds in the theme park is still bearable and not so long queue except those new ride that makes us queue for 1 hour. the place is desgin is great every spot is a beautiful spot for photo taking. for genting i feel one of a thing you need to fix is your staff attitude learn to be more customer centric.

just came here yesterday! my 2 friends and i had a lot of fun here not a paid review lol . we ve been coming to genting theme park since high school days 18 years ago when the corkscrew rollercoaster was still around. there were no rollercoasters that were operational this time which is why i gave 4 stars instead of 5 but the other rides were quite fun. most of it spins you around like crazy so definitely no heavy meals should be taken before going on the rides. top rides for me were esd global defender independance day terraform tower and alpha fighter pilots. samba gliders was so so and same goes to epic voyage to moonhaven was expecting a bigger drop. but the whole theme park looks absolutely great! felt like i was transported outside of malaysia and the white fog just made everything seemed magical. i would probably come again and wouldn t mind just walking around the park without going on the rides. it definitely does not feel like the old local theme park. some tips to share for an enjoyable experience 1. go on a weekday no school holidays or public holidays or weekend to avoid massive crowds. 2. reach the entrance of the theme park before 11am. once the park opens for the first hour you can go on any rides without using vq and there s hardly any queue. 3. buy tickets online in advance and download the skyworld app. 4. if you go in a group at least one person should purchase the ticket with the photo . not just about the photos but you can make advance vq bookings for the rides 30 days before your visit. if you purchase the normal tickets without photo you can only start making vq reservations on the day of your visit. with the photo you can also get your photos taken all around the theme park by the photographers and the photos will instantly appear in the app and you can download them and share with friends. 5. study the map of the theme park in advance so you can book the rides conveniently without rushing from one end to the other end. andromeda base has the most fun rides terraform tower alpha fighter pilots bootcamp training as well as central park independence day and esd global defenders night at the museum . 6. make a group for friends family members in the app and then u can book rides as a group for everyone else. super convenient. 7. vq reservations were actually useful as some rides you can totally just cut the walk in queue. for some rides you still have to wait about 5 10minutes but still not as long as the normal queue. saves a lot of time! 8. bring a thin raincoat you ll need it for the log ride epic voyage and the weather sometimes can randomly get a bit rainy and chilly. 9. a lot of options for food throughout the park which were of course on the pricey side but no point in having full meals inside here. it s a lot more enjoyable to eat at sky avenue mall where there are a lot of cheaper ish options once you re done at the theme park. coming back again when the rollercoasters are open! for the price i think it s quite worth it if you properly plan your visit in advance. try not to compare it to other theme parks like uss as the park is still during the soft opening launch period

u put two star just because the independence day ride are poorly managed. no head count were made. me n my family are left a part. even after i manage to get a seat on my own they force me to give it up for other family since i was alone. been direct back n forth to search for a new seat for few minutes and the show won t start till i get a seat. i felt embarrassed since everyone were looking at me in anger. thus i gave up n went out to cool myself. i promised myself from today onward i won t step on this ride anymore. i ve been qued for too long. and this is the way they treating their guest.
richard marx in concert was the best . fulfilled my bucket list to catch his show. very entertaining and experience was fantastic.
had a bad experience prior crew with bad attitude ride breakdowns to getting vip but vip guide hernie made our day so much better. she was very helpful and helped us take lots of photos and videos

early bird pay more than from buying instant it s not 10 or 20 but 50 expensive.. recommend not to buy them as early bird because may cheated if latest promotion is damn low like this.. bad luck with this experience paying double for same day entry counter customer service not helpful they say me buy in 2024 dec and now 2025 feb promotion but i dont care because two different time is buy for same month february redemption. they give me feeling that why i buy in advanced? now i saw latest promotion 50 cheaper than what i had bought in 2 months ago.

i had a great experience at sky world theme park. i had a vip experience there. erin my vip experience expert made our day . no lines free ice creams many photos. thankuou erin for keeping such a good care of us.
bad experience with the theme park. over priced with so little options to enjoy. whole day you may only able to enjoy 3 to 4 rides with the long que.

the staff from the terraform was very rude to customers. they did wrong queue and we saw others later than us able to play before us and still claim that it s our own fault on wrong queue. on off peak periods also can t finish the rides. lots of rides having issue during the visit. the guest service staff was helpful but then the ride attraction staff need to have more training. this one star review is for the rude staff that ruined my trip ending on that day.
fun rides great vibes and perfect for all ages. a must visit if you re in genting!

some rides not yet open such as the cars which what i actually want to ride in but the rest able to make me and my family entertained for the whole day. use the vc app to book your ride to shorten your q and some rides must be booked first. went during weekday crowd still a lot but not that tight. not able to ride the rollercoasters as those qs are super long but able to do 13 rides in total.

i went ahead with the vip pass and i had an amazing experience riding all the attractions skipping all the lines and being accompanied by hernie who made sure i was always on time provided an amazing experience and made sure i didn t miss anything. would absolutely recommend.
will be better by using their app to make appointment for each themepark. condition of theme park still in well maintained.

there s still some main attraction not yet open to visitors.. might need to revisit next time after the grand opening. the rides are futuristic and quite different from other theme park in malaysia. plus point not sure if it s a long term policy or promotional period they provide rainy day guarantee where you get complimentary ticket for next visit within 12 months if it s raining more than 2.5 hours during your visit.

long queues in the games made it worse. an app is needed to reserve 3 games for normal entry. if you wanna make all games without waiting by the vip ticket it comes with a tour guide but is expensive. pricing is high in general for non malaysian

worst day in malaysia. most rides are closed. even though we paid 600 rm with only one child to play. all 6 rides in the photo were closed without prior notice when we bought the tickets on the day !!!!! . i am sure more ride were also closed by did not bother to look further. made a complain to refund the tickets but they told us refund is not an option. save your money time and energy and avoid this place.

most of the games are closed for maintenance coming soon or needs reservation. when you try to reserve it the times are really late or not available. we paid nearly 200rm and it was totally not worth it.

park close on tuesday. might probably wednesday is the best day to visit theme park. arrived at 11am sharp enter the park and start to play the game! we might be lucky as we dont even have to wait 5 min approximately no long que . except for samba glider 20 min que. there were maintenance on independence day. i realised after 1 30pm a lot of ride seems to have technical issues. need to wait a while. or maybe can take lunch first and come back. overall it was nice experience. and will come back of course!!!! parking follow the skyworld theme park parking signboard and you will see huge multilevel parking. max rate rm12. can pay via tng. park at b4 or b5. take lift to level 1. follow the signboard till you see the theme park. enjoy! locker 4h for rm20. 8h for rm25. keep all you bag in locker just bring along your phone cc debit card. its all cashless inside park . go and enjoy to play all ride once done then you may pickup back your things in locker.

bad service just paid for queing without playing ! let me explain here we are queue been ages almost 2 hour each of the ride it was starting from rivet tower waiting then sudden the ride has been suspended due techinical issue . then we move to acorn advanture almost 1hour and half not only that we move terra tower keep queing almost 1 hour sudden again the ride has been suspended due weather .! request for complimentary but didnt have chance on it. from out of state travel here for 4hours but really not worth it!!
very good theme park and well maintained. love the movie themes. good variety of rides from simple to thrill.

last week i went to genting theme park to celebrate my friend s birthday and thanks to her we are able to enjoy the vip benefits. we were assisted by a guide called hernie and she was so passionate and kind. would definitely recommend her to be the guide

one of the staff at the entrance had a bad attitude which was a bit disappointing. but overall the theme park outside was really fun and super cool ! you can literally feel how cold it is we were freezing! some parts of the park weren t open yet and one of the 3d ice age attractions had an issue. the staff told us about it so we waited for a while. luckily when we came back later the ice age ride was finally back to normal . unfortunately it started raining and we ended up freezing even more . but the restaurants there are quite limited not many choices available. still it was a fun experience overall!

fun experience. i would recommend buying the tickets in advance online it s cheaper and there s also bundle deals which is super worth it. everything is cashless in the theme park. vq is pretty convenient. the waiting time is inconsistent it may be shorter for some rides but some others might have wait a little longer. it s easy to navigate around and the staff is also super friendly and helpful.

buy tickets online in advance either from klook or the genting app to get discounts. get the photo add on only if you are traveling solo or as a couple and want pictures together. photographers are available at only 3 4 spots inside the theme park so the backgrounds for photo will be limited. it is preferable to visit on weekdays and early in the morning to avoid queues. download the skyworld app to check ride wait times and register for vq for certain rides. some rides require vq so having the app will make this easier. you can bring bags mobiles and selfie sticks as most rides have free storage available before you board. overall it s a fun place with a few thrill rides. you will need at least 6 7 hours to complete all the rides and take pictures at all locations.

for outdoor theme park games suggest to download their skyworld apps to make payment and reservation to avoid long queues. please stanby umbrella or poco raincoat for outdoor theme park sometimes wheather might be differ on that day.

become million guess of 2025 and rewarded vip experience of the skyworld. the vip experience help to play the game without to queue long.ellya been very helpful by providing information and guide us during the visit.

not bad but i would not come back even if someone pays me. the amount you spend for the trip and experience does not worth it. you would not have a good time with your toddler due to height restrictions that kind of meaningless. having gone to disneyland you would understand what i am talking about. it is better not to go here and save your money to enjoy other places

i give zero star rate sorry to say but your system is terrible!!! firstly you require us to have vq reservations but then when the time finally reach the app system down! so i showed the phone notification to the person at the gate she say cannot enter due to no qr code. and ask me to go to customer service counter. since it was system down of cos there s a long queue over there! yes under the big hot sun. but since i don t wan to disappoint my kids i went along with the queue and stood for half an hour causing my sunburnt
amazing theme park with a lot of modern and thrilling rides

i didnt stay in genting resort. instead i stayed at gohtong jaya. 2bed aptmt with acceptional facilities. but the experience after 15 years never stepped my foot in genting is great. my son enjoyed the moments and we absolutely will come back

crazy magical! in the evening this theme park will be full of fog feeling like i was in the sky. download the app of genting highlands before you come so you can skip the queue by showing the staff you are registered in the specific time. otherwise you have to wait for an hour in the queue. mini carnival games was so much fun and worth it to try. defo a nice and fun place! however if it raining almost all of the attraction will be fully stopped.

great attempt by genting! there were a number of very good rides. enjoyed it. ride queues were 20 40 min. the mobile app provides real time queue time to allow you to plan. of course the cool weather makes it more comfortable to wait in the queue. buying tickets onsite is a pain for a foreigner. foreign credit card does not work with the self service machines only for msian credit card . queued there then found out it s not working. was redirected to vip counter. thankfully not a counter with long queue fish n chips shop ran out of fish and chips at 1pm! just ate onion rings. they were good.

very good travel experience but the problem is that many theme parks most of which are exciting and usually children s games less. and many theme parks haven t opened yet i don t think it s worth the price. the staff inside are also very polite.
it s really fun to play but the weather is cold and most equipment is unavailable while it s raining it s quite a good place for a malaysian to play if u enjoy the cold weather

best ride was independence day defiance at 130 rm for non malaysian it was worth the price but overall an ok ok theme park i won t be repeating it. virtual queue mechanism could be made better as it has waiting too hence what s the point my perspective
